tasks.title: Write API documentation for HardwareSecurityModule trait
tasks.description: Comprehensive rustdoc documentation for HAL trait: all methods documented, platform-specific behavior noted, authentication requirements clarified, error conditions described. Include implementation guidance for new backends.

tasks.title: Write security documentation and threat model
tasks.description: Create comprehensive security documentation: threat model, attack surface analysis, security assumptions, hardening guidelines, secure usage patterns, common pitfalls to avoid. Document zero-extraction guarantee and how it's enforced.

tasks.title: Write integration guide for downstream modules
tasks.description: Create integration guide for other Loc'd modules that depend on this module: initialization sequence, common patterns, error handling strategies, performance considerations, testing recommendations. Include code examples.

tasks.title: Write platform-specific setup guides
tasks.description: Create platform-specific setup guides: iOS (Secure Enclave entitlements, provisioning), Android (StrongBox requirements, permissions), Linux (TPM 2.0 setup, tpm2-tss installation, udev rules). Include troubleshooting steps.

tasks.title: Implement fuzzing harness for cryptographic operations
tasks.description: Create fuzzing harnesses using cargo-fuzz for cryptographic operations: signature verification (ensure no panic on malformed input), decryption (ensure no panic on malformed ciphertext), key derivation (handle arbitrary inputs). Run initial fuzzing campaign and fix any issues.

tasks.title: Implement constant-time verification for sensitive operations
tasks.description: Audit and implement constant-time operations where timing attacks are a risk: signature tag comparison, key comparison, conditional operations on secret data. Use subtle crate or equivalent. Document which operations are constant-time.

tasks.title: Implement defense against fault injection attacks
tasks.description: Implement countermeasures against fault injection: redundant checks, verification after signing, randomized execution order where possible. Document assumptions about hardware fault resistance. Consider double-check pattern for critical operations.

tasks.title: Create automated security audit script
tasks.description: Create script to automate security checks: grep for dangerous patterns (unwrap in crypto code, println in sensitive areas), check for proper error handling, verify no debug logging of secrets, check for timing attack vulnerabilities. Run in CI.

tasks.title: Implement disaster recovery key backup considerations
tasks.description: Document and implement disaster recovery considerations: key backup procedures (if applicable per protocol), recovery key generation, key loss scenarios, migration strategies. Ensure documentation covers what happens when hardware fails.

tasks.title: Implement key rotation support
tasks.description: Implement key rotation mechanisms: generate new keys while preserving old for validation, key version tracking, graceful transition between keys. Support rotation for Device Keys. Document rotation procedures.

tasks.title: Write end-to-end integration tests
tasks.description: End-to-end tests simulating real usage: generate Master Key, generate Device Key, create session keys, perform X25519 agreement, encrypt/decrypt data, sign delegation token structures, verify signatures. Tests run on actual hardware or high-fidelity mocks.

tasks.title: Implement CI/CD pipeline with cross-platform testing
tasks.description: Set up comprehensive CI/CD: build on Linux, macOS (iOS target), Android; run unit tests, integration tests, benchmarks; security audit checks; clippy lints; documentation build; code coverage reporting. Matrix builds for different feature combinations.

tasks.title: Create example applications demonstrating usage
tasks.description: Create example applications: simple key generation and signing demo, session establishment demo, encryption/decryption example. Examples should be well-commented and demonstrate best practices. Include README for each example.

tasks.title: Write changelog and versioning documentation
tasks.description: Create CHANGELOG following Keep a Changelog format. Document version compatibility guarantees. Document breaking changes policy. Include migration guides for major versions. Set up semantic versioning.

tasks.title: Implement telemetry and metrics collection
tasks.description: Implement optional telemetry for monitoring: operation latency histograms, error rate counters, hardware usage gauges. Use metrics crate or similar. Ensure no sensitive data in telemetry. Make collection opt-in.

tasks.title: Implement configuration management
tasks.description: Implement configuration system for module settings: feature flags, timeout values, retry policies, logging levels. Support configuration via code, environment variables, and config files. Validate configuration at startup.

tasks.title: Final security audit and penetration testing preparation
tasks.description: Prepare for external security audit: document attack surface, create threat model summary, prepare test environment, document assumptions, create audit checklist. Review code against OWASP crypto guidelines and NIST recommendations.

tasks.title: Implement Ed25519 batch signature verification optimization
tasks.description: Implement batch verification for Ed25519 signatures to improve performance when verifying multiple signatures. Use batch verification APIs from libsodium or ed25519-dalek. Ensure batch verification is equivalent to individual verification results.

tasks.title: Implement key derivation path handling for hierarchical keys
tasks.description: Implement hierarchical key derivation using HKDF for derived keys from Master Key or Device Key material. Support derivation paths for different purposes (credentials, sessions, etc.). Ensure derived keys are domain-separated.

tasks.title: Implement safe memory page allocation for large buffers
tasks.description: Implement safe memory page allocation for large cryptographic buffers (e.g., Argon2id memory). Use mmap with MAP_LOCKED or equivalent where available. Ensure pages are zeroed before and after use. Handle allocation failures gracefully.

tasks.title: Implement secure random nonce generation with collision resistance
tasks.description: Enhance nonce generation with collision resistance: use 96-bit random + 32-bit counter or similar construction for ChaCha20-Poly1305. Track recent nonces to detect reuse. Generate truly random 192-bit nonces for XChaCha20-Poly1305.

tasks.title: Create comprehensive test vectors documentation
tasks.description: Document all test vectors used: RFC sources, expected inputs/outputs, rationale for selection. Include both passing and failing test vectors. Make documentation useful for third-party implementers.

tasks.title: Implement key serialization and deserialization
tasks.description: Implement secure serialization for key handles: persistent storage format for key references (not material), import/export of public keys, key handle migration between formats. Use CBOR or protobuf for serialization.

tasks.title: Implement protocol-specific cryptographic utilities
tasks.description: Implement utilities specific to Loc'd protocol: delegation token signing helper, revocation statement signing, challenge-response generation and verification. Ensure these follow protocol specification exactly.

tasks.title: Write architecture decision records (ADRs)
tasks.description: Document architectural decisions: choice of cryptographic libraries, HAL design rationale, platform abstraction approach, error handling strategy, key handle design. Include alternatives considered and trade-offs made.

tasks.title: Implement cleanup and resource leak detection
tasks.description: Implement resource cleanup verification: track allocations, detect leaks in tests, ensure all TPM handles freed, all Keychain items released, all sessions closed. Use RAII patterns throughout. Add debug-only leak detection.

tasks.title: Final comprehensive module integration and validation
tasks.description: Final integration of all components: ensure all modules work together, run complete test suite, verify all acceptance criteria from PRD are met, performance benchmarks pass, security audit clean. Prepare release candidate.

tasks.title: Define core data types and interfaces
tasks.description: Create dataclasses for IdentityRecord, RevocationRecord, RotationRecord, ServiceRecord, CacheStats, ResolverHealth. Define DnsError exception hierarchy with specific error codes (dns_lookup_failed, dnssec_invalid, identity_not_found, identity_expired, version_unsupported, algorithm_unsupported). Include degraded flag and cached_at timestamp in response types.
acceptance_criteria: All record types defined with correct field types
Error hierarchy includes all required error codes
Response objects include degraded and cached_at fields

tasks.title: Set up project structure and dependencies
tasks.description: Create project structure with pyproject.toml, install dnspython, httpx/aiohttp, cryptography dependencies. Set up __init__.py exports for public API. Create requirements.txt and dev dependencies for pytest, pytest-asyncio, mypy.

tasks.title: Implement configuration and constants module
tasks.description: Create config module with default values: DoH endpoints (Cloudflare, Google, Quad9), default TTLs (300s active, 60s revoked), cache size (1000 entries), timeouts (5s), retry logic (2 retries, 500ms exponential backoff), min/max cache floors (60s/3600s). Support environment variable overrides.

tasks.title: Implement base64url encoding/decoding utilities
tasks.description: Create crypto_utils module with base64url_encode/decode functions per RFC 4648 Section 5 (no padding). Implement validation that Ed25519 public keys decode to exactly 32 bytes. Include error handling for malformed encoding.
acceptance_criteria: Proper error handling for invalid input

tasks.title: Implement UUID v4 validation utility
tasks.description: Create validation function for UUID v4 format used in delegation IDs. Use standard library uuid module to validate string format matches UUID v4 specification.

tasks.title: Implement TXT record concatenation handler
tasks.description: Implement RFC 7208 compliant TXT record concatenation where multiple strings within a single TXT RDATA are concatenated without delimiters. Handle edge cases like empty strings, single string, and many strings.

tasks.title: Implement field parser for key=value pairs
tasks.description: Create generic field parser that splits by semicolon-space ('; ') delimiter, trims whitespace, extracts key=value pairs. Handle missing values, empty values, and preserve unknown fields for forward compatibility.

tasks.title: Implement _locd identity record parser
tasks.description: Create parser for _locd TXT records extracting v, k, p, t fields (required) and exp, rev (optional). Validate v='locd1', k='ed25519', base64url-decode p to 32 bytes. Convert t and exp to integers. Return IdentityRecord.

tasks.title: Implement _locd-revoke revocation record parser
tasks.description: Create parser for _locd-revoke TXT records extracting v, ids, t fields. Split ids by semicolon into array. Validate each ID as UUID v4 format. Validate v='locd-revoke1'. Return RevocationRecord.
acceptance_criteria: Validates UUID v4 format for each ID

tasks.title: Implement _locd-rotate key rotation record parser
tasks.description: Create parser for _locd-rotate TXT records extracting v, old, new, t, sig fields. Base64url-decode old and new keys to 32 bytes each. Validate sig field presence. Validate v='locd-rotate1'. Return RotationRecord.

tasks.title: Implement _locd-svc service discovery record parser
tasks.description: Create parser for _locd-svc TXT records extracting v, port, actions, min-delegation-ttl fields. Parse port as integer. Split actions by semicolon into string array. Parse min-delegation-ttl as integer. Validate v='locd-svc1'. Return ServiceRecord.
acceptance_criteria: Extracts all fields with correct types

tasks.title: Implement record type auto-detection dispatcher
tasks.description: Create dispatcher that examines the 'v' field value to determine record type (locd1, locd-revoke1, locd-rotate1, locd-svc1) and routes to appropriate parser. Handle unknown version gracefully with error.
acceptance_criteria: Correctly dispatches based on v field
Returns appropriate error for unknown versions

tasks.title: Implement missing field validation
tasks.description: Enhance all parsers to return specific validation errors identifying which required field is missing. Create MissingFieldError with field name context.
acceptance_criteria: Returns specific error for each missing required field
Tests for all required fields across record types

tasks.title: Implement _locd identity record builder
tasks.description: Create build_identity_record function that takes public_key (bytes), timestamp (int), expiry (int|None), revocation_url (str|None) and produces formatted TXT value: 'v=locd1; k=ed25519; p=<base64url-key>; t=<timestamp>' with optional fields included only when non-None. Use semicolon-space delimiters.

tasks.title: Implement _locd-revoke revocation record builder
tasks.description: Create build_revocation_record function that takes delegation_ids (list[str]), timestamp (int) and produces formatted TXT value with semicolon-delimited IDs.

tasks.title: Implement _locd-rotate key rotation record builder
tasks.description: Create build_rotation_record function that takes old_key (bytes), new_key (bytes), timestamp (int), signature (bytes) and produces formatted TXT value with base64url-encoded keys and signature.

tasks.title: Implement _locd-svc service record builder
tasks.description: Create build_service_record function that takes port (int), actions (list[str]), min_delegation_ttl (int) and produces formatted TXT value with semicolon-delimited actions.

tasks.title: Implement builder round-trip validation tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive tests ensuring all builders produce output that parses back to equivalent input through parsers. Test with various combinations of optional fields.

tasks.title: Implement LRU cache data structure with TTL
tasks.description: Create TTLAwareCache class using OrderedDict or similar. Support key format (record_type, domain) tuples. Track per-entry TTL, insertion time. Support configurable max size with LRU eviction.

tasks.title: Implement cache entry retrieval with TTL check
tasks.description: Create get method that checks if entry exists and is not expired. Return entry with metadata (is_expired, cached_at) or None. Differentiate between fresh and stale entries.

tasks.title: Implement cache entry storage with TTL enforcement
tasks.description: Create set method that stores entry with TTL. Enforce minimum floor (60s) and maximum ceiling (3600s) on TTL values. Update LRU order on access.

tasks.title: Implement cache statistics tracking
tasks.description: Add hit/miss counters, entry count tracking, degraded entries count. Create CacheStats dataclass for reporting.

tasks.title: Implement cache status and clear methods
tasks.description: Create cache_status() returning CacheStats and clear_cache() for manual management. Expose through public API.

tasks.title: Implement DoH query encoding per RFC 8484
tasks.description: Create DNS wire-format query encoder. Encode DNS query to wire format using dnspython. Base64url-encode without padding for dns parameter. Set correct content type headers.

tasks.title: Implement DoH HTTPS GET request builder
tasks.description: Create DoH request builder using httpx/aiohttp. Construct URL with dns parameter. Set Accept: application/dns-message header. Support HTTP/2.

tasks.title: Implement DoH response decoder
tasks.description: Decode DoH response from wire format back to dnspython message object. Handle various response content types.

tasks.title: Implement DoH client with failover
tasks.description: Create DoHClient class that tries multiple configured endpoints in order. On HTTP error (4xx/5xx) or timeout, fall back to next resolver. Return dns_lookup_failed if all fail.

tasks.title: Implement standard DNS client fallback
tasks.description: Create StandardDNSClient using dnspython resolver. Support custom nameservers. Handle timeouts and retries.

tasks.title: Implement DNSSEC validation chain verification
tasks.description: Integrate dnspython dnssec module for validation. Verify chain of trust from root zone KSK through DS/DNSKEY pairs to RRSIG covering TXT record. Use cryptography library for signature verification. Mandatory rejection of invalid records.
acceptance_criteria: Rejects records with no DNSSEC signatures

tasks.title: Implement DNSSEC trust anchor configuration
tasks.description: Configure root zone KSK trust anchor. Support loading from external source or embedded. Handle root key rollovers.

tasks.title: Implement query abstraction layer
tasks.description: Create unified query interface supporting both DoH and standard DNS. Accept transport selection parameter. Use DoHClient or StandardDNSClient based on configuration.

tasks.title: Implement TXT record extraction from DNS response
tasks.description: Extract TXT records from dnspython answer. Handle multiple TXT records at same label. Process each independently. Return list of raw TXT strings.

tasks.title: Implement cooperative namespace query construction
tasks.description: Handle both formats: _locd.<domain> (domain-owner) and <username>._locd.id.locd.net (cooperative namespace). Parse input format and construct correct query.

tasks.title: Implement request deduplication with coalescing
tasks.description: Create in-flight query tracker. When multiple callers query same (record_type, domain) simultaneously, issue single DNS query and fan out result to all waiters. Use asyncio primitives (Event or Queue).
acceptance_criteria: Single DNS query for concurrent identical requests

tasks.title: Implement timeout and retry logic
tasks.description: Implement configurable timeout (default 5s) and retry (default 2 retries with exponential backoff starting at 500ms). Apply to all DNS operations.

tasks.title: Implement graceful degradation with stale cache
tasks.description: When DNS fails (timeout, SERVFAIL, network error), check cache for stale entry. If found, return with degraded=true flag and cached_at timestamp. If not found, propagate error.
acceptance_criteria: Returns stale cache on DNS failure

tasks.title: Implement cache integration in query flow
tasks.description: Check cache before DNS query. On cache miss and successful DNS response, store in cache with appropriate TTL. Use response TTL with min/max enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: Uses DNS response TTL with limits

tasks.title: Implement resolve_identity public API
tasks.description: Create async resolve_identity(domain: str, use_doh: bool=True, skip_cache: bool=False) -> IdentityRecord | DnsError. Query _locd.<domain> or cooperative namespace. Validate DNSSEC. Parse and return IdentityRecord.

tasks.title: Implement resolve_revocations public API
tasks.description: Create async resolve_revocations(domain: str, use_doh: bool=True, skip_cache: bool=False) -> RevocationRecord | DnsError. Query _locd-revoke.<domain>.

tasks.title: Implement resolve_rotation public API
tasks.description: Create async resolve_rotation(domain: str, use_doh: bool=True, skip_cache: bool=False) -> RotationRecord | DnsError. Query _locd-rotate.<domain>.

tasks.title: Implement resolve_service public API
tasks.description: Create async resolve_service(domain: str, use_doh: bool=True, skip_cache: bool=False) -> ServiceRecord | DnsError. Query _locd-svc.<domain>.

tasks.title: Implement publish_record API skeleton
tasks.description: Create async publish_record(domain: str, record_type: str, value: str) placeholder. Note: Actual implementation depends on DNS provider APIs outside this module scope. Return NotImplementedError with documentation.

tasks.title: Implement health check method
tasks.description: Create health_check() -> ResolverHealth method. Perform lookup against known-good record (e.g., cooperative namespace root or test domain). Return resolver reachability status, which resolvers responded, latency metrics.

tasks.title: Implement error metadata with DNS response codes
tasks.description: Enhance errors to include raw DNS response codes (NXDOMAIN, SERVFAIL, etc.) in metadata. Create structured error context.
acceptance_criteria: DNS response codes in error metadata

tasks.description: Test all four parsers with valid records, missing fields, invalid versions, invalid algorithms, malformed base64url, invalid UUIDs. 100% branch coverage.

tasks.description: Test all four builders with various input combinations. Verify output format. Test round-trip with parsers.

tasks.title: Create unit tests for caching layer

tasks.title: Create unit tests for base64url utilities
tasks.description: Test encoding/decoding, padding handling, 32-byte validation, error cases for malformed input.

tasks.title: Create integration tests for DNSSEC validation
tasks.description: Test DNSSEC validation with real signed and intentionally broken domains if available. Test chain validation logic.

tasks.title: Create integration tests for full resolution flow
tasks.description: End-to-end tests for resolve_identity, resolve_revocations, resolve_rotation, resolve_service using mock DNS responses.

tasks.title: Create tests for graceful degradation
tasks.description: Test behavior when DNS is unreachable. Verify stale cache is served with degraded flag. Verify error when no cache available.

tasks.title: Create tests for request deduplication

acceptance_criteria: Single DNS query for concurrent requests

tasks.title: Create tests for cooperative namespace resolution
tasks.description: Test both domain-owner and cooperative namespace formats. Verify correct query construction for each.

tasks.title: Create tests for timeout and retry logic
tasks.description: Test timeout configuration, retry attempts, exponential backoff timing. Test behavior with slow responses.

tasks.title: Create performance benchmarks for cache operations
tasks.description: Benchmark cache get/set operations, LRU eviction performance, concurrent access patterns.

tasks.description: Implement async context manager for proper resource cleanup (HTTP connections, etc.). Support `async with` pattern.

tasks.description: Implement mock DNS server for controlled testing. Support custom responses, delays, error simulation.

tasks.description: Implement mock DoH endpoint for controlled testing. Support RFC 8484 format, custom responses, HTTP error simulation.

tasks.title: Implement base64url encoding for 32-byte public keys
tasks.description: Implement RFC 4648 Section 5 base64url encoding without padding. Ensure 32-byte Ed25519 public keys encode to exactly 43-character strings.

tasks.title: Implement base64url decoding with validation
tasks.description: Implement RFC 4648 Section 5 base64url decoding that rejects malformed inputs and validates output length. Must reject non-base64url characters and incorrect lengths.

tasks.description: Combine base64url encode/decode into identity string utilities. Create functions to convert between raw public key bytes and 43-character identity strings.
acceptance_criteria: Handles edge cases and invalid inputs

tasks.title: Implement createIdentity() API method
tasks.description: Implement the createIdentity() function per API contract: generates Ed25519 key pair in secure enclave, returns publicKey (32 bytes), identityString (43 chars), and createdAt timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: Returns correct structure per API contract

tasks.title: Implement DNS TXT record parser
tasks.description: Create parser for semicolon-delimited key=value pairs in DNS TXT records. Handle optional whitespace, field ordering independence, and multiple character-strings per RFC 7208 Section 3.3.

tasks.title: Implement required field validation (v, k, p, t)
tasks.description: Validate that required fields v, k, p, t are present and well-formed. v must equal 'locd1', k must equal 'ed25519', p must be valid base64url 32 bytes, t must be valid Unix timestamp.

tasks.title: Implement optional field validation (exp, rev)
tasks.description: Validate optional fields when present: exp must be valid Unix timestamp, rev must be well-formed HTTPS URL (reject HTTP-only).
acceptance_criteria: exp validation accepts valid Unix timestamps
rev validation accepts only HTTPS URLs

tasks.title: Implement version unsupported error handling
tasks.description: Return version_unsupported reason code when v field is not 'locd1'. Ensure proper error message and structured response.

tasks.title: Implement algorithm unsupported error handling
tasks.description: Return algorithm_unsupported reason code when k field is not 'ed25519'. Ensure proper error message and structured response.

tasks.title: Implement malformed record error handling
tasks.description: Return malformed_record reason code for various malformed inputs: invalid base64url, wrong public key length, invalid timestamps, etc.
acceptance_criteria: Returns malformed_record for wrong key length

tasks.title: Implement validateRecord() API method
tasks.description: Implement validateRecord(txtRecord: string) per API contract: returns { valid: bool, fields: ParsedRecord, errors?: string[] }. Combines parsing and validation logic.
acceptance_criteria: Returns correct structure for valid records
Returns errors array for invalid records

tasks.title: Research and select DNS resolver library with DNSSEC support
tasks.description: Evaluate trust-dns, getdns, unbound bindings, or other DNS libraries for DNSSEC validation capabilities. Document selection criteria and integration approach.

tasks.title: Implement DNS TXT record resolver for _locd.<domain>
tasks.description: Create DNS resolver that queries TXT records at _locd.<domain>. Handle NXDOMAIN, SERVFAIL, and other DNS error conditions with appropriate reason codes.

tasks.title: Implement DNSSEC chain validation
tasks.description: Verify full DNSSEC chain of trust from root zone to _locd record using DS/DNSKEY/RRSIG records per RFC 4033-4035. Reject records failing validation with dnssec_invalid reason code.
acceptance_criteria: Validates full chain of trust from root

tasks.title: Implement DNSSEC bypass detection and rejection
tasks.description: Detect and reject responses where DNSSEC validation was bypassed or unavailable. Ensure mandatory DNSSEC enforcement on every lookup.

tasks.title: Implement identity expiry checking
tasks.description: Check exp field against current time. Return identity_expired reason code for identities past their expiry timestamp. Treat absent exp as non-expiring.

tasks.title: Implement future timestamp rejection
tasks.description: Reject records where t field is more than 60 seconds in the future relative to verifier's clock to prevent pre-dated records while allowing minor clock skew.
acceptance_criteria: Rejects records with t > 60s in future

tasks.title: Implement lookupIdentity() API method
tasks.description: Implement lookupIdentity(domain: string, options: { useDoH?: bool }) per API contract. Combines DNS resolution, DNSSEC validation, record parsing, and expiry checking.
acceptance_criteria: Returns error with reason code on failure

tasks.title: Implement DNS-over-HTTPS (DoH) client per RFC 8484

tasks.title: Implement DoH resolver configuration
tasks.description: Allow configurable DoH resolvers with defaults to Cloudflare (1.1.1.1) and Google (8.8.8.8). Support self-hosted resolver configuration.

tasks.title: Integrate DoH into identity lookup flow

acceptance_criteria: No plaintext DNS when DoH enabled

tasks.title: Implement identity record cache storage

tasks.title: Implement cacheGet() API method

acceptance_criteria: Monitoring alerts on any traffic detection

tasks.title: Coordination service Docker containerization
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile for coordination service, multi-stage build for minimal image size, configure for self-hosting with environment variable configuration

tasks.title: Coordination service binary distribution
tasks.description: Set up build pipeline for cross-platform binary distribution (Linux, macOS, Windows), static linking where possible, release automation

tasks.title: STUN client implementation for NAT type detection
tasks.description: Implement STUN client following RFC 5389, support binding discovery, NAT type detection (full-cone, restricted-cone, port-restricted, symmetric)

tasks.title: ICE-like candidate gathering implementation
tasks.description: Implement Interactive Connectivity Establishment style candidate gathering, collect host, server-reflexive, and relay candidates, prioritize candidates by type

tasks.title: UDP hole-punching core implementation
tasks.description: Implement UDP hole-punching algorithm for NAT traversal, coordinate with peer via coordination service, attempt simultaneous open, handle different NAT types
acceptance_criteria: Hole-punching works for common NAT types

tasks.title: UDP hole-punching for symmetric NAT
tasks.description: Handle symmetric NAT scenarios where port prediction is required, implement port prediction heuristics, ensure TURN fallback for guaranteed connectivity

tasks.title: TURN client implementation
tasks.description: Implement TURN client following RFC 5766, support allocation requests, permission establishment, data relay, authenticate via Loc'd identity

tasks.title: TURN relay zero-knowledge verification
tasks.description: Ensure TURN relay only handles encrypted WireGuard packets, implement packet inspection to verify WireGuard format, reject non-WireGuard traffic

tasks.title: NAT traversal path selection logic
tasks.description: Implement intelligent path selection: try direct connection first, then UDP hole-punching, then STUN for reflexive candidates, finally TURN relay, track path success rates

tasks.title: No public port enforcement
tasks.description: Implement enforcement that mesh devices never listen on publicly accessible ports, verify all connections use hole-punching, relay, or coordination-based rendezvous

tasks.title: Peer-to-peer discovery protocol
tasks.description: Implement gossip-style address exchange for small meshes (2-5 devices), broadcast known peer list to directly connected peers, merge received peer lists

tasks.title: Bootstrap connection handling for P2P discovery
tasks.description: Implement initial bootstrap connection logic for peer-to-peer discovery mode, use coordination service for first connection only, then disable coordination dependency

tasks.title: Peer-to-peer discovery mode toggle
tasks.description: Implement configuration option to enable/disable P2P discovery mode, automatic mode selection based on mesh size, graceful transition between modes

tasks.title: Delegation token sync protocol design
tasks.description: Design sync protocol for delegation token sets using CRDT or vector-clock-based merge, define SYNC_REQUEST/SYNC_RESPONSE message formats for tokens

tasks.title: Delegation token sync implementation
tasks.description: Implement delegation token synchronization over WireGuard mesh, handle concurrent updates without conflicts, resolve divergent token sets

tasks.title: Revocation list sync protocol design
tasks.description: Design sync protocol for revocation lists, ensure strong consistency requirements, define SYNC_REQUEST/SYNC_RESPONSE for revocations with priority handling

tasks.title: Revocation list sync implementation
tasks.description: Implement revocation list synchronization over WireGuard mesh, ensure propagation within 60 seconds, handle concurrent revocation updates

tasks.title: Revocation-triggered peer removal
tasks.description: Implement automatic removal of WireGuard peer entries when delegation token is revoked, refuse new connections from revoked devices, notify affected peers

tasks.title: Legacy Bridge credential sync protocol
tasks.description: Implement cross-device sync protocol for Legacy Bridge credentials, use DH key agreement (X25519) between Device Keys for shared secret derivation

tasks.title: Legacy Bridge credential encryption for transmission
tasks.description: Encrypt credentials using XChaCha20-Poly1305 with HKDF-SHA256 derived key from DH shared secret, implement authenticated encryption with associated data

tasks.title: Legacy Bridge credential re-encryption to receiver's TPM
tasks.description: Implement re-encryption of credentials to receiver's TPM-bound key upon receipt, integrate with TPM/Secure Enclave interface, discard shared secret after sync

tasks.title: Legacy Bridge credential sync transmission
tasks.description: Transmit encrypted credentials over WireGuard mesh, implement retry logic for failed transmissions, verify delivery acknowledgment

tasks.title: Mutual authentication protocol integration
tasks.description: Implement bidirectional verification protocol from Section 7.3 for mesh connections, ensure both sides complete verification before marking tunnel authenticated
acceptance_criteria: Tunnel marked authenticated only after both sides

tasks.title: Mesh topology state management
tasks.description: Implement local topology state on each device: peer entries with WireGuard public key, last known endpoint, delegation token reference, last-seen timestamp, connection quality metrics

tasks.title: Mesh peer addition workflow
tasks.description: Implement workflow for adding new peers to mesh: verify delegation token, exchange WireGuard keys, configure peer entry, trigger initial sync

tasks.title: Mesh peer removal workflow
tasks.description: Implement workflow for removing peers from mesh: remove WireGuard peer entry, update topology state, notify other peers, cleanup cached data

tasks.title: Mesh reconnection handling with exponential backoff
tasks.description: Implement reconnection logic with exponential backoff and jitter (initial 1s, max 60s), immediate reconnection on network state changes, track reconnection attempts

tasks.title: Graceful degradation when coordination service unreachable
tasks.description: Implement fallback to cached peer information when coordination service is unreachable, use last-known endpoints for direct connection attempts, queue updates for later sync

tasks.title: Session Key lifetime enforcement
tasks.description: Implement 24-hour maximum Session Key (Tier 3) lifetime tracking, force re-authentication after timeout, implement session refresh protocol

tasks.title: Connection quality metrics tracking
tasks.description: Implement connection quality metrics: latency, packet loss, throughput, NAT traversal method used, store in topology state for path optimization

tasks.title: Network state change detection
tasks.description: Implement network interface monitoring to detect changes (IP change, interface up/down), trigger immediate peer reconnection attempts on changes

tasks.title: Error handling for WireGuard operations
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling for all WireGuard operations: interface creation failures, peer configuration errors, handshake failures, key generation errors

tasks.title: Error handling for coordination service operations
tasks.description: Implement error handling for coordination service: connection failures, authentication failures, API errors, timeout handling, retry with backoff

tasks.title: Error handling for NAT traversal
tasks.description: Implement error handling for NAT traversal: STUN server unreachable, TURN allocation failure, hole-punching timeout, fallback chain execution

tasks.title: Error handling for sync operations
tasks.description: Implement error handling for sync operations: sync request failures, merge conflicts, transmission errors, acknowledgment timeouts

tasks.title: Unit tests for topology management

tasks.description: Write end-to-end test simulating real-world scenario: device registration, tunnel establishment, data sync, revocation propagation, graceful shutdown

tasks.description: Conduct security audit of coordination service authentication, verify challenge-response integrity, ensure no credential leakage

tasks.description: Optimize WireGuard throughput: tune buffer sizes, MTU settings, implement performance benchmarks, document expected throughput

tasks.description: Optimize connection establishment time: reduce key exchange latency, optimize NAT traversal path selection, ensure sub-5-second establishment

tasks.description: Optimize sync efficiency: reduce sync payload size, implement delta sync, optimize CRDT merge performance

tasks.description: Verify Headscale API compatibility: test against existing Headscale clients, ensure response format compatibility, document deviations

tasks.title: Legacy system migration guide
tasks.description: Write migration guide for transitioning from other mesh/overlay solutions: data migration, parallel operation, cutover procedures

tasks.title: Initialize Legacy Bridge module structure and dependencies
tasks.description: Create module directory structure, configure build system, add cryptographic dependencies (libsodium or platform equivalent), CBOR library, OAuth 2.0 client, and TPM platform APIs. Set up CI/CD pipeline with security scanning.
acceptance_criteria: Module directory structure created with src/, include/, tests/ subdirectories
Build configuration includes libsodium, cbor, and TPM libraries
CI pipeline runs static analysis and security checks
Dependency versions pinned and checksums verified

tasks.title: Define credential type enums and data structures
tasks.description: Define credential type enum (PASSWORD, API_KEY, OAUTH_ACCESS, OAUTH_REFRESH, OAUTH_PAIR, BEARER_TOKEN, CUSTOM_SECRET), credential record structure with encrypted payload and metadata, vault file schema, and sync message structures. Create header files with type definitions.
acceptance_criteria: CredentialType enum defined with all 7 variants
CredentialRecord struct contains nonce (24 bytes), salt (32 bytes), auth_tag (16 bytes), ciphertext, and metadata
CredentialMetadata struct contains service domain, type enum, timestamps
SyncMessage struct defined for CBOR serialization

tasks.title: Implement secure memory allocation primitives
tasks.description: Create secure memory allocator using platform-specific APIs (mlock/VirtualLock) for non-swappable pages. Implement functions: secure_alloc(), secure_free(), secure_zeroize() with volatile write patterns to prevent compiler optimization. Add watchdog timer infrastructure for forced zeroization on timeout.
acceptance_criteria: secure_alloc() allocates locked memory pages using mlock() on Unix or VirtualLock() on Windows
secure_zeroize() uses volatile write pattern or explicit_bzero/SecureZeroMemory
Watchdog timer can force-zeroize buffers after configurable timeout

tasks.title: Implement XChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption wrapper
tasks.description: Create wrapper around libsodium's XChaCha20-Poly1305 implementation for authenticated encryption. Implement encrypt_credential() and decrypt_credential() functions with 24-byte nonce generation, 32-byte key input, and 16-byte authentication tag handling.
acceptance_criteria: encrypt_credential() generates random 24-byte nonce per operation
decrypt_credential() verifies tag and returns error on authentication failure
Nonce is unique per encryption operation (uses secure RNG)

tasks.title: Implement HKDF-SHA256 key derivation
tasks.description: Implement HKDF-SHA256 per RFC 5869 for deriving credential encryption keys from TPM-bound Device Key. Support extract-and-expand with context string 'locd-legacy-bridge-v1-credential' and per-credential 32-byte random salt.
acceptance_criteria: HKDF extract phase uses Device Key as IKM
HKDF expand phase produces 32-byte key with context string 'locd-legacy-bridge-v1-credential'
Per-credential 32-byte salt is used in derivation
Output key length is exactly 32 bytes for XChaCha20-Poly1305

tasks.title: Implement TPM session management
tasks.description: Create TPM session manager to establish and maintain TPM 2.0 or Secure Enclave sessions. Implement functions: tpm_session_open(), tpm_session_close(), tpm_is_available(). Handle TPM-unavailable errors explicitly without software fallback.
acceptance_criteria: tpm_session_open() establishes authenticated session with TPM 2.0 or Secure Enclave
tpm_is_available() returns true only when TPM hardware is accessible
All operations fail with explicit TPM_UNAVAILABLE error when TPM not present
Session handles are securely managed and released on close

tasks.title: Implement Device Key HKDF derivation via TPM
tasks.description: Integrate with Key Hierarchy module to obtain Tier 2 Device Key and perform HKDF operations within TPM trust boundary. Submit HKDF derivation request to TPM, receive derived key in sealed memory buffer.
acceptance_criteria: Device Key is retrieved from Key Hierarchy module
HKDF derivation request submitted to TPM using TPM2_HMAC or equivalent
Derived key is returned in secure memory buffer without exposure outside TPM boundary
Key derivation fails if TPM session not active

tasks.title: Implement vault file HMAC-SHA256 integrity protection
tasks.description: Add HMAC-SHA256 authentication for entire vault file using key derived from Device Key. Implement compute_vault_hmac() and verify_vault_hmac() functions. HMAC is computed over CBOR-encoded vault data.
acceptance_criteria: HMAC-SHA256 computed over entire vault file contents using HKDF-derived key
HMAC stored separately from vault data
verify_vault_hmac() returns error if tampering detected
HMAC verification performed on every vault read operation

tasks.title: Implement CBOR vault serialization and deserialization
tasks.description: Create CBOR encoder/decoder for vault file format per RFC 8949. Implement serialization of credential map keyed by service domain with array of credential records. Handle variable-length ciphertext encoding.
acceptance_criteria: Vault serializes to CBOR map with service domain keys
Each service contains array of credential records
Credential record encodes nonce (24 bytes), salt (32 bytes), auth_tag (16 bytes), ciphertext
Deserialization recovers original data structure exactly
Handles unknown fields gracefully for forward compatibility

tasks.title: Implement vault file I/O operations
tasks.description: Create vault file read/write operations with atomic updates. Implement read_vault(), write_vault() with safe atomic file replacement using temp file + rename. Support configurable path (default ~/.locd/bridge/vault.cbor) with directory creation.
acceptance_criteria: read_vault() reads, verifies HMAC, and deserializes vault file
write_vault() serializes, computes HMAC, and atomically writes to disk
Atomic update uses temp file + rename pattern
Creates parent directories if they don't exist
Handles file permissions securely (user read/write only)

tasks.title: Implement CredentialVault core structure
tasks.description: Create CredentialVault class/struct with internal state management including loaded vault data, TPM session reference, and file path. Implement constructor with TPM session initialization and vault loading.
acceptance_criteria: CredentialVault struct contains vault data map, TPM session handle, file path
Constructor initializes TPM session and loads vault from disk
Returns error if TPM unavailable or vault corrupt
Destructor ensures secure cleanup of sensitive data

tasks.title: Implement CredentialVault::store() method
tasks.description: Implement credential storage with encryption flow: generate salt, derive key via HKDF, encrypt with XChaCha20-Poly1305, store record with metadata, write vault atomically. Returns unique credential_id.
acceptance_criteria: Derives encryption key via HKDF-SHA256 from Device Key
Stores encrypted record with metadata (service domain, type, timestamps)

tasks.title: Implement CredentialVault::retrieve() method with JIT decryption
tasks.description: Implement credential retrieval with TPM-gated decryption. Find credential by ID, verify TPM availability, derive key, decrypt, return plaintext in secure buffer. Fails with TPM-unavailable error if hardware not accessible.
acceptance_criteria: Requires active TPM session to decrypt
Derives key using stored salt and HKDF
Decrypts using XChaCha20-Poly1305 with stored nonce
Returns plaintext in secure mlock'd buffer
Returns explicit TPM_UNAVAILABLE error if TPM not accessible

tasks.title: Implement CredentialVault::delete() with secure overwrite
tasks.description: Implement credential deletion that overwrites ciphertext in vault file. Remove credential from in-memory map, rewrite vault file atomically ensuring deleted credential's ciphertext is not recoverable.
acceptance_criteria: Removes credential from vault data structure
Rewrites vault file with remaining credentials
Deleted credential's ciphertext overwritten by compaction
Returns error if credential_id not found

tasks.title: Implement CredentialVault::list() method
tasks.description: Implement credential listing that returns metadata only (no plaintext). Support filtering by service domain or list all. Returns array of metadata structs with service domain, type, timestamps, sync status.
acceptance_criteria: Returns metadata for all credentials when no filter specified
Returns credentials filtered by service domain when specified
Never exposes encrypted payload or plaintext
Metadata includes: service domain, credential type, creation date, last used, last rotated, sync status

tasks.title: Implement credential injection request context
tasks.description: Define RequestContext structure for credential injection containing protocol type, destination URL, headers, body template, and injection point specification. Support HTTP Basic Auth, Bearer token, custom headers, and body field injection.
acceptance_criteria: RequestContext struct contains protocol type enum
Supports HTTP Basic Auth, Bearer token, custom header, body field injection types
Contains target URL, existing headers map, body template
Injection point specifies where credential is inserted

tasks.title: Implement HTTP Basic Auth adapter for credential injection
tasks.description: Create adapter that injects credentials into HTTP Basic Auth header. Base64 encode username:password and add Authorization header. Handle both username+password and API key as password scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Returns augmented request context with new header

tasks.title: Implement HTTP Bearer token adapter for credential injection
tasks.description: Create adapter that injects bearer tokens into Authorization header. Support OAuth access tokens and generic bearer tokens. Add 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header to request.
acceptance_criteria: Handles OAuth access tokens from OAUTH_PAIR credentials
Returns augmented request context with new header

tasks.title: Implement custom header injection adapter
tasks.description: Create adapter for injecting credentials into custom HTTP headers (e.g., X-API-Key). Support configurable header name and optional prefix/suffix formatting.
acceptance_criteria: Injects credential into specified custom header name
Returns augmented request context with custom header added

tasks.title: Implement request body field injection adapter
tasks.description: Create adapter for injecting credentials into JSON or form-encoded request body fields. Support field path specification (e.g., 'auth.token') for nested JSON objects.
acceptance_criteria: Injects credential into specified JSON field path
Supports nested paths using dot notation
Returns augmented request with modified body

tasks.title: Implement CredentialInjector core structure
tasks.description: Create CredentialInjector class that holds reference to CredentialVault and manages injection operations. Implement constructor and protocol adapter registry.

tasks.title: Implement CredentialInjector::inject() with atomic operation
tasks.description: Implement atomic injection operation: decrypt credential into secure buffer, inject into request context using appropriate adapter, zeroize plaintext immediately after request construction. Ensure plaintext exists in memory only during injection.
acceptance_criteria: Retrieves and decrypts credential in single atomic operation
Selects appropriate adapter based on credential type and request context
Zeroizes plaintext buffer immediately after request construction
Maximum plaintext lifetime enforced (5 seconds watchdog)

tasks.title: Implement TLS client certificate adapter
tasks.description: Create adapter for injecting client certificates into TLS connections. Support certificates stored as CUSTOM_SECRET credentials. Integrate with platform TLS APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Configures TLS context with client certificate
Supports PEM and DER certificate formats

tasks.title: Implement plaintext lifetime watchdog timer
tasks.description: Create watchdog timer that force-zeroizes credential buffers after maximum lifetime (5 seconds). Implement per-buffer timer registration and automatic cleanup on timeout.
acceptance_criteria: Force-zeroizes buffer after 5 seconds if not already zeroized
Uses platform timer APIs (timer_create, SetTimer, etc.)
Logs warning if watchdog triggers (indicates bug)

tasks.title: Implement memory forensic resistance for injection
tasks.description: Add measures to prevent credential recovery from memory dumps: use guarded heap allocations, randomize buffer offsets, implement decoy allocations. Focus on protecting plaintext during injection window.
acceptance_criteria: Plaintext buffers use guard pages where available
Random padding added around sensitive buffers
Decoy allocations prevent predictable memory patterns
Buffers marked as sensitive for memory analysis tools

tasks.title: Implement X25519 ephemeral key pair generation
tasks.description: Create X25519 key pair generation per RFC 7748 for sync Diffie-Hellman exchange. Generate ephemeral keys for each sync operation, never persist to storage.
acceptance_criteria: Generates X25519 key pair using secure RNG
Private key generated in secure memory
Keys are ephemeral (unique per sync operation)
Private key never written to persistent storage

tasks.title: Implement X25519 Diffie-Hellman shared secret computation
tasks.description: Implement X25519 ECDH for computing shared secrets between device key pairs. Takes local ephemeral private key and remote ephemeral public key, outputs 32-byte shared secret.
acceptance_criteria: Computes X25519 shared secret given private and public keys
Shared secret never written to persistent storage

tasks.title: Implement sync protocol message structure
tasks.description: Define CBOR-encoded sync message format with fields: protocol version, ephemeral public key, encrypted payload, nonce, HMAC for integrity. Create serialize/deserialize functions.
acceptance_criteria: Contains initiator ephemeral X25519 public key (32 bytes)
Contains encrypted payload with credential data

tasks.title: Implement sync credential encryption for transit
tasks.description: Encrypt credentials for transit using XChaCha20-Poly1305 with key derived from DH shared secret via HKDF. Context string: 'locd-legacy-bridge-v1-sync-transit'.
acceptance_criteria: Derives transit key via HKDF-SHA256 from DH shared secret
Generates unique nonce per sync operation
Shared secret discarded immediately after encryption

tasks.title: Implement sync credential decryption and re-encryption
tasks.description: Decrypt transit-encrypted credentials using DH shared secret, then immediately re-encrypt using local TPM-bound Device Key before storage. Ensure plaintext exists only momentarily.
acceptance_criteria: Derives transit key from DH shared secret
Immediately re-encrypts using local Device Key via HKDF
Plaintext exists only in secure buffer between decrypt/encrypt
Shared secret and transit key zeroized after use

tasks.title: Implement SyncManager core structure
tasks.description: Create SyncManager class that manages cross-device synchronization. Integrates with WireGuard mesh for transport, CredentialVault for credential access, and TPM for local encryption.
acceptance_criteria: SyncManager contains reference to CredentialVault and WireGuard mesh
Manages ephemeral key state during sync

tasks.title: Implement SyncManager::initiate_sync() method
tasks.description: Implement sync initiation: generate ephemeral X25519 key pair, send sync-request over WireGuard mesh with ephemeral public key, wait for responder public key, compute shared secret, encrypt credentials, transmit payload.
acceptance_criteria: Sends sync-request with ephemeral public key over WireGuard mesh
Zeroizes all ephemeral keys and shared secret after completion

tasks.title: Implement SyncManager::receive_sync() method
tasks.description: Implement sync reception: receive sync-request, generate ephemeral key pair, send ephemeral public key, compute shared secret, receive encrypted payload, decrypt credentials, re-encrypt to local TPM key, store in vault.
acceptance_criteria: Receives sync-request with initiator ephemeral public key
Generates responder ephemeral X25519 key pair
Re-encrypts each credential to local Device Key
Zeroizes ephemeral keys and shared secret

tasks.title: Implement sync conflict resolution
tasks.description: Implement last-write-wins conflict resolution based on credential modification timestamp. Maintain conflict log for user review. Support manual conflict resolution via API.
acceptance_criteria: Compares credential modification timestamps on conflict
Conflict entry created in conflict log with both versions

tasks.title: Implement XChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption wrapper for Master Key backup

acceptance_criteria: Authentication tags are verified on decryption

tasks.title: Implement CTAP2 client abstraction layer

Handle platform differences (Windows Hello, macOS TouchID, Linux libfido2).

tasks.title: Implement FIDO2 resident credential storage interface

Ensure credentials are tied to specific relying party ID and cannot be extracted.
acceptance_criteria: Data is bound to specific RP ID

tasks.title: Implement secure enclave export for iOS

tasks.title: Implement secure enclave export for Android StrongBox
tasks.description: Implement Android-specific secure export using KeyStore with setIsStrongBoxBacked. Support KeyGenParameterSpec with user authentication requirements. Create wrapped key reference for export operations. Handle Android version differences (API 28+ for StrongBox, fallback to TEE).

tasks.title: Implement secure enclave export for TPM 2.0
tasks.description: Implement TPM 2.0 specific export using TPM2_Create and TPM2_Load. Support policy authorization for export. Create wrapped key reference that maintains TPM binding. Handle TPM2 key duplication with proper authorization sessions.

tasks.title: Implement USB Recovery Key creation flow
tasks.description: Implement complete USB recovery key creation: prompt for passphrase, validate passphrase strength (minimum 80 bits entropy), derive key with Argon2id, encrypt Master Key with XChaCha20-Poly1305, store in FIDO2 resident credential with rk extension. Handle user presence verification (button press). Return RecoveryKeyMetadata.
acceptance_criteria: User presence verified via button press
Private key never exists outside enclave

tasks.title: Implement atomic credential write with rollback on failure

acceptance_criteria: No partial credential data on failure

tasks.title: Implement passphrase strength validation

tasks.title: Implement USB Recovery Key restoration flow
tasks.description: Implement complete USB recovery restoration: detect USB key insertion, enumerate resident credentials, prompt for passphrase, verify user presence (button press), internally decrypt Master Key on USB key, transfer to new device secure enclave via CTAP2 pinUvAuthProtocol secure channel. Return MasterKeyReference.
acceptance_criteria: User presence verified via button press
Decryption happens internally on USB key
Master Key transferred to new enclave

tasks.title: Implement secure channel for key transfer during recovery
tasks.description: Implement CTAP2 pinUvAuthProtocol (version 1 and 2) for establishing secure channel between USB key and device secure enclave. Handle shared secret establishment, message authentication, and encryption of key material during transfer. Prevent MITM attacks during recovery.

tasks.title: Implement incorrect passphrase handling with timing attack resistance
tasks.description: Ensure failed passphrase attempts are indistinguishable from invalid key scenarios. Implement constant-time comparison for all cryptographic operations. Return generic 'authentication failed' message without revealing whether passphrase or key is invalid. Include rate limiting to prevent brute force.
acceptance_criteria: No information leakage about failure mode

tasks.title: Implement RecoveryKeyManager core interface

Include proper error handling and audit logging.
acceptance_criteria: Audit events generated for all operations

tasks.title: Implement recovery key metadata storage

tasks.title: Implement multiple USB recovery key management

tasks.title: Implement recovery key revocation
