tasks.title: Implement Shamir's Secret Sharing GF(2^8) arithmetic
tasks.description: Implement Galois Field GF(2^8) arithmetic for Shamir's Secret Sharing. Include operations: addition (XOR), multiplication (using log/antilog tables or Russian peasant), division, polynomial evaluation at points. Ensure constant-time operations where possible to prevent timing attacks.

tasks.title: Implement Lagrange interpolation for Shamir reconstruction
tasks.description: Implement Lagrange interpolation over GF(2^8) for reconstructing secret from shares. Support any threshold number of shares up to 255. Ensure information-theoretic security: no partial information leakage below threshold. Validate all inputs to prevent faults.
acceptance_criteria: No partial information leakage below threshold

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share generation with configurable threshold
tasks.description: Generate Shamir shares: create random polynomial of degree (threshold-1), evaluate at N points for N shares. Support configurable threshold and total shares (recommended 5 shares, threshold 3, but configurable). Use cryptographically secure random number generation for coefficients.
acceptance_criteria: N shares generated for N points

tasks.title: Implement Ed25519 to X25519 key conversion
tasks.description: Implement conversion from Ed25519 signing keys to X25519 key agreement keys per RFC 7748. This allows using Ed25519 public keys for encrypting Shamir shares via X25519 ECDH. Include both public and private key conversion.
acceptance_criteria: Public and private key conversion supported

tasks.title: Implement HKDF-SHA256 key derivation for Shamir share encryption
tasks.description: Implement HKDF-SHA256 (RFC 5869) for deriving encryption keys from X25519 shared secrets. Use for encrypting individual Shamir shares to recipients. Support context info parameter for domain separation.

tasks.title: Implement individual Shamir share encryption
tasks.description: Encrypt each Shamir share individually to its recipient: convert recipient Ed25519 to X25519, perform ECDH to get shared secret, derive key with HKDF-SHA256, encrypt share with XChaCha20-Poly1305. Each share encrypted with different key ensuring only intended recipient can decrypt.
acceptance_criteria: Each share encrypted to specific recipient

tasks.title: Implement ShamirManager core interface
tasks.description: Implement ShamirManager class with methods: createShares(threshold, totalShares, recipientPublicKeys) -> EncryptedShare[], reconstructFromShares(shares, passphrase, targetEnclaveHandle) -> MasterKeyReference. Include share validation, threshold checking, and proper error handling.
acceptance_criteria: Proper error handling for invalid shares

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share validation and verification
tasks.description: Implement share validation: verify share format, check cryptographic integrity, validate recipient binding, detect corrupted or tampered shares. Include verification that shares belong to same secret (using checksum or commitment scheme).

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share distribution via QR codes
tasks.description: Support offline distribution of Shamir shares via QR codes: encode encrypted share to QR format with error correction, support printing and scanning, include metadata (share index, timestamp, verification hash). Ensure QR codes can be scanned reliably in various lighting conditions.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share distribution via encrypted files
tasks.description: Support offline distribution via encrypted files: export share to file (JSON or binary format), include metadata and verification data, support password protection for file itself (in addition to share encryption), support air-gapped transfer.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share distribution via mesh network
tasks.description: Support distribution via mesh connectivity layer: send encrypted shares directly to recipient devices over mesh network, verify recipient identity before transmission, confirm delivery and storage. Handle offline recipients with queueing.
acceptance_criteria: Shares sent over mesh to verified recipients

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share reconstruction workflow
tasks.description: Implement complete reconstruction workflow: collect shares from threshold number of recipients, decrypt each share with recipient's private key (X25519 ECDH + HKDF), validate shares, reconstruct Master Key backup using Lagrange interpolation, verify reconstructed key matches expected public key, transfer to secure enclave.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share holder management
tasks.description: Manage Shamir share holders: track who holds which shares, store holder contact information (encrypted), support updating share recipients (re-encrypt to new recipient), track share verification dates, support removing/recalling shares.

tasks.title: Implement insufficient shares handling
tasks.description: Handle case when fewer than threshold shares are available: clearly communicate to user, explain how many more shares are needed, provide guidance on contacting additional share holders, ensure no partial information is exposed or leaked.

tasks.title: Implement PostRecoveryOrchestrator core interface
tasks.description: Implement PostRecoveryOrchestrator class with methods: rotateIdentity(oldMasterKey, newMasterKey, domain) -> RotationRecord, invalidateAllDelegations(masterKey, domain) -> RevocationRecord, repairDevices(masterKey, deviceKeys) -> DelegationToken[]. Coordinate all post-recovery activities.

tasks.title: Implement DNS key rotation record generation
tasks.description: Generate DNS key rotation record at _locd-rotate.<domain> with format: v=locd-rotate1; old=<old-pubkey>; new=<new-pubkey>; t=<timestamp>; sig=<signature-by-old-key>. Include proper base64url encoding, signature generation using old Master Key.

tasks.title: Implement DNS key rotation record publication with DNSSEC
tasks.description: Publish key rotation record to DNS with DNSSEC signing. Handle DNS propagation, verify record is correctly published and signed, support multiple DNS providers, handle publication failures gracefully with retry logic.

tasks.title: Implement 7-day transition period for key rotation
tasks.description: Implement 7-day transition period after key rotation: during transition, both old and new public keys accepted for identity resolution, track transition start time, enforce 7-day duration, after transition only new key accepted. Verifiers check transition status.
acceptance_criteria: Transition end triggers old key rejection

tasks.title: Implement delegation token invalidation during key rotation
tasks.description: Invalidate all existing delegation tokens after recovery: publish token IDs to _locd-revoke DNS record, post to HTTPS revocation endpoint simultaneously, ensure all verifiers receive revocation, track revocation status. Support both immediate and scheduled revocation.

tasks.title: Implement device re-pairing after recovery
tasks.description: Implement device re-pairing: after Master Key restored to new device, re-issue delegation tokens to existing devices or revoke stale delegations. Present user with list of known devices, allow selective re-authorization or revocation, generate new tokens from recovered Master Key.

tasks.title: Implement irrecoverable identity detection
tasks.description: Detect when no recovery backup exists: check for USB recovery keys, check for Shamir shares, verify all known backups are revoked or inaccessible. Present clear assessment to user that identity is irrecoverable.

tasks.title: Implement irrecoverable identity user flow
tasks.description: Implement flow for irrecoverable identity: clearly communicate permanent identity loss, explain by-design nature of no backdoors, offer guided new identity creation, provide per-service legacy credential recovery guidance. Support emotional impact acknowledgment.

tasks.title: Implement legacy credential recovery guidance
tasks.description: Provide guidance for recovering access to services without identity: generate list of services previously linked, provide service-specific recovery instructions (contact support, use backup codes, etc.), help user prioritize critical services.

tasks.title: Implement namespace deauthorization for irrecoverable identities
tasks.description: Deauthorize cooperative namespace subdomain when identity is lost: release username for re-registration, publish deauthorization record, ensure new identity can claim released username. Handle timing to prevent squatting.

tasks.title: Implement legacy credential retention on mesh devices
tasks.description: Ensure legacy bridge credentials synced to other mesh devices remain accessible when old Master Key device is lost: credentials encrypted to respective TPM-bound keys on each device, accessible without original Master Key device. Verify retention mechanism.

tasks.title: Implement recovery key health monitoring scheduler
tasks.description: Implement scheduler for periodic recovery key health checks: configurable intervals (default 90 days), track last verification dates, trigger health check workflows, handle missed checks with escalating reminders.

tasks.title: Implement USB key accessibility verification
tasks.description: Implement verification that USB recovery keys are still accessible: prompt user to insert each key, verify physical presence detection works, check credential is still readable, update last verified timestamp. Handle keys that fail verification.

tasks.title: Implement passphrase recall prompts
tasks.description: Implement periodic passphrase recall prompts: remind user to verify they remember passphrase without actually requiring it (optional test), track recall confidence, escalate to actual verification if user is uncertain.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share holder reachability checks
tasks.description: Implement periodic checks for Shamir share holder reachability: prompt user to verify contact info is current, suggest reaching out to holders periodically, track last contact verification, alert if holders appear unreachable.

tasks.title: Implement health monitoring dashboard UI
tasks.description: Create UI dashboard for recovery key health: display all recovery keys and their status, show last verification dates, indicate health status (healthy/warning/critical), provide quick actions for verification, display Shamir share distribution status.

tasks.title: Implement cross-platform recovery compatibility layer
tasks.description: Ensure recovery works across platforms: handle differences between iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Linux for secure enclave operations, CTAP2 support, and Ed25519 handling. Normalize platform differences behind unified interface.

tasks.title: Implement USB key creation API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/recovery/usb-key/create endpoint: validate secure enclave session, accept passphrase and USB key handle, initiate creation flow, return RecoveryKeyMetadata. Include rate limiting, input validation, and proper error responses.

tasks.title: Implement USB key restoration API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/recovery/usb-key/restore endpoint: validate secure enclave session, accept passphrase and USB key handle, initiate restoration flow, return MasterKeyReference. Include progress tracking for multi-step CTAP2 operations.

tasks.title: Implement recovery key listing API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement GET /api/recovery/keys endpoint: return list of recovery key metadata for authenticated user. Include filtering (active/revoked/all), pagination, and caching headers. Never include key material.

tasks.title: Implement recovery key revocation API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement DELETE /api/recovery/keys/{keyId} endpoint: validate ownership of key, mark as revoked, attempt credential deletion, return success/failure status. Require confirmation to prevent accidental revocation.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share creation API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/recovery/shamir/create-shares endpoint: accept threshold, totalShares, recipientPublicKeys, generate shares, encrypt individually, return encrypted share blobs as base64url-encoded payloads. Validate all inputs.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir reconstruction API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/recovery/shamir/reconstruct endpoint: accept encrypted share blobs (base64url), validate threshold met, decrypt shares, reconstruct Master Key, transfer to secure enclave. Return MasterKeyReference.

tasks.title: Implement identity rotation API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/recovery/rotate-identity endpoint: accept old and new Master Key references, domain, generate and publish DNS rotation record, initiate transition period. Return RotationRecord with tracking information.

tasks.title: Implement device reauthorization API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/recovery/reauthorize-devices endpoint: accept list of devices to re-authorize or revoke, generate new delegation tokens, publish revocations. Accept user confirmation token to prevent CSRF.

tasks.title: Implement API authentication and authorization middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware to enforce secure enclave session requirements for all recovery endpoints. Validate session tokens, check session freshness, enforce MFA where required, log all access attempts.

tasks.title: Implement USB key creation unit tests
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for USB key creation: test happy path, test invalid passphrase handling, test USB disconnection scenarios, test atomic write failures, verify Argon2id parameters, verify XChaCha20-Poly1305 usage. Mock CTAP2 layer for testing.

tasks.title: Implement USB key restoration unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for USB key restoration: test correct passphrase, test incorrect passphrase, test physical presence verification, test secure channel establishment, test transfer to enclave. Verify constant-time operations and no information leakage.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir share generation unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for Shamir share generation: test various threshold/total combinations, verify mathematical correctness of shares, verify information-theoretic security (shares reveal nothing below threshold), test encryption to recipients.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir reconstruction unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for Shamir reconstruction: test exact threshold, test more than threshold, test fewer than threshold (must fail), test invalid shares, test corrupted shares, verify no partial leakage. Include property-based tests.

tasks.title: Implement key rotation unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for key rotation: test DNS record generation, test publication, test transition period enforcement, test delegation invalidation. Mock DNS and delegation layers.

tasks.title: Implement integration tests for complete recovery flow
tasks.description: Write end-to-end integration tests: create USB key, simulate device loss, restore on new device, verify identity restored, verify device re-pairing, verify key rotation. Test with mock secure enclaves and CTAP2 devices.

tasks.title: Implement Shamir integration tests
tasks.description: Write integration tests for Shamir flow: create shares with threshold 3/5, simulate holder collaboration, reconstruct on new device, verify identity restored. Test various holder combinations and failure scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement cross-platform recovery integration tests
tasks.description: Write integration tests for cross-platform recovery: create key on one platform (mock), restore on different platform, verify compatibility. Test iOS<->Android, mobile<->desktop combinations.

tasks.title: Implement API endpoint integration tests
tasks.description: Write integration tests for all API endpoints: test request/response formats, test authentication requirements, test error responses, test rate limiting, test concurrent requests.

tasks.title: Implement timing attack resistance tests
tasks.description: Write tests to verify timing attack resistance: measure execution time for various inputs, verify constant-time operations for cryptographic comparisons, test passphrase verification timing, test share validation timing.

tasks.title: Implement fuzz testing for recovery inputs
tasks.description: Implement fuzz testing for all recovery inputs: fuzz passphrases, USB key handles, share data, API request bodies. Verify no crashes, no memory leaks, proper error handling for malformed inputs.

tasks.title: Implement side-channel resistance for Shamir operations
tasks.description: Implement side-channel resistant operations for Shamir: constant-time GF(2^8) operations, cache-timing safe table lookups, branch-free implementations where possible. Verify with testing tools.

tasks.title: Implement secure memory wiping
tasks.description: Ensure all sensitive data is securely wiped from memory: Master Key material during export/import, passphrases after use, share data after reconstruction. Use explicit_bzero or equivalent, prevent compiler optimization from removing wipes.

tasks.title: Implement formal verification for Shamir GF(2^8) arithmetic
tasks.description: Apply formal verification to critical GF(2^8) arithmetic operations: prove correctness of multiplication, prove Lagrange interpolation correctness, verify no secret leakage. Use Coq, Cryptol, or similar tools.

tasks.title: Implement penetration testing scenarios
tasks.description: Create penetration testing scenarios for recovery system: attempt to extract key material from USB key, attempt to reconstruct from partial shares, attempt MITM during recovery, attempt bypass of physical presence. Document mitigations.

tasks.title: Implement disaster recovery documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive disaster recovery documentation: step-by-step recovery procedures for each scenario, troubleshooting guides, emergency contact information, rollback procedures. Include runbooks for operators.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system architecture documentation
tasks.description: Document recovery system architecture: component diagrams, data flow diagrams, sequence diagrams for recovery flows, security architecture documentation, threat model documentation.

tasks.title: Implement API documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive API documentation for all endpoints: request/response schemas, authentication requirements, error codes, rate limits, example requests and responses. Use OpenAPI/Swagger format.

tasks.title: Implement user-facing recovery guides
tasks.description: Create user-facing documentation: how to create recovery keys, how to store them securely, how to perform recovery, how to set up Shamir shares, what to do if identity is lost. Use clear, accessible language.

tasks.title: Implement monitoring and alerting for recovery operations
tasks.description: Implement monitoring for recovery system: track recovery operation success/failure rates, alert on unusual patterns (multiple failed passphrase attempts), monitor DNS propagation for rotation records, alert on health check failures.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system performance benchmarks
tasks.description: Create performance benchmarks: Argon2id derivation time, USB key operation latency, Shamir share generation/reconstruction time, API response times. Establish baseline performance requirements.

tasks.title: Implement load testing for recovery API endpoints
tasks.description: Implement load testing for recovery endpoints: simulate concurrent recovery operations, test rate limiting effectiveness, verify system stability under load, identify bottlenecks.

tasks.title: Implement backup and restore for recovery metadata
tasks.description: Implement backup/restore for recovery key metadata: export encrypted metadata for backup, import metadata on new device, handle version differences, ensure metadata integrity with checksums.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system configuration management
tasks.description: Create configuration system for recovery parameters: Argon2id parameters (validated against protocol), health check intervals, transition period duration, rate limits. Support environment-specific configuration.

tasks.title: Implement graceful degradation for missing hardware
tasks.description: Implement graceful handling when hardware features unavailable: fallback when StrongBox unavailable, software implementation for development/testing, clear messaging to user about hardware requirements.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system telemetry (privacy-preserving)
tasks.description: Implement optional telemetry for recovery system: aggregate success/failure metrics (no individual identification), performance metrics, hardware compatibility data. Ensure privacy preservation, no key material or identity info leaked.

tasks.title: Implement recovery key expiration and renewal
tasks.description: Implement optional expiration for recovery keys: configure key lifetime, prompt for renewal before expiration, support seamless key rotation (create new, revoke old), track key age.

tasks.title: Implement emergency recovery contact system
tasks.description: Implement emergency contact system for Shamir recovery: store encrypted contact information for share holders, provide one-click contact initiation during recovery, support multiple contact methods (email, phone, mesh message).

tasks.title: Implement recovery system accessibility features
tasks.description: Implement accessibility features for recovery UI: screen reader support for all recovery flows, high contrast mode, keyboard navigation, text scaling support, voice control compatibility.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system localization
tasks.description: Implement localization for recovery system: translate all user-facing strings, support right-to-left languages, localize error messages (without security info leakage), cultural adaptation for recovery concepts.

tasks.title: Implement recovery simulation/testing mode
tasks.description: Implement safe simulation mode for testing recovery: simulate recovery without affecting real identity, test passphrase recall, test USB key operations with test keys, verify Shamir share distribution. Mark all simulations clearly.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system rollback capabilities
tasks.description: Implement rollback for failed recovery operations: undo partial device re-pairing, restore previous delegation state if rotation fails, clean up partial key rotation DNS records, notify user of rollback.

tasks.title: Implement USB key vendor compatibility testing
tasks.description: Test compatibility with major USB security key vendors: YubiKey (various models), Google Titan, Feitian, Thetis. Document supported features per vendor, workarounds for vendor quirks, minimum firmware versions.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system rate limiting and abuse prevention
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive rate limiting: per-user limits on recovery attempts, per-IP limits, exponential backoff for failed passphrase attempts, CAPTCHA integration after threshold failures, account lockout for suspicious activity.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system audit and compliance reporting
tasks.description: Implement audit reporting for compliance: generate reports on recovery operations, track key rotation events, document Shamir share holder changes, export audit logs in standard formats (CEF, LEEF).

tasks.title: Implement recovery system database schema
tasks.description: Design and implement database schema for recovery data: recovery key metadata table, Shamir share holder table, rotation history table, health check status table. Include indexes, constraints, encryption at rest.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system data retention policies
tasks.description: Implement data retention policies: automatic purging of old audit logs per policy, anonymization of historical data, retention of critical security events, user data deletion on account closure.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system upgrade/migration paths
tasks.description: Implement upgrade paths for recovery data: migrate from old format versions, handle protocol version changes, upgrade encryption algorithms when needed, maintain backward compatibility during transitions.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system end-to-end encryption verification
tasks.description: Implement verification of end-to-end encryption in recovery: verify Master Key never exposed in plaintext outside secure enclaves, verify USB key encryption, verify share encryption. Document security invariants.

tasks.title: Implement recovery system final integration and acceptance testing
tasks.description: Perform final integration testing: test all components together, verify all acceptance criteria from PRD, performance testing, security review, documentation review. Create acceptance test report.

tasks.title: Initialize project structure and dependencies
tasks.description: Create the project structure for the Service Discovery SDK with subdirectories for each language (Python, Node.js, Go). Set up package management files (pyproject.toml, package.json, go.mod), configure linting, formatting tools, and CI/CD pipelines. Add core dependencies: CBOR libraries (cbor2, cbor-x, fxamacker/cbor), COSE libraries, Ed25519 crypto libraries, DNS libraries.
acceptance_criteria: Project structure created with language-specific directories
Dependency files initialized with required libraries
CI pipeline configured for automated testing

tasks.title: Define core data structures and types
tasks.description: Create type definitions for all core structures: LocdVerifierConfig, Identity, DelegationToken, VerificationResult, ChallengeMessage, ResponseMessage, ResultMessage, ServiceRecord, CacheEntry, RevocationEntry. Define enums for reason codes per Section 7.4 (delegation_expired, delegation_revoked, scope_violation, dnssec_invalid, nonce_mismatch, timestamp_skew, chain_too_deep, dns_lookup_failed, version_unsupported).
acceptance_criteria: All core data structures defined with proper types
Reason code enum matches Section 7.4 specification
Type definitions are language-idiomatic for all three languages

tasks.title: Implement CBOR message serializer for HELLO
tasks.description: Implement CBOR encoding/decoding for HELLO messages per RFC 8949. Support fields: version (string), identity_domain (string), device_key (byte string), wireguard_key (optional byte string), supported_versions (array). Use cbor2 (Python), cbor-x (Node.js), fxamacker/cbor (Go). Implement deterministic encoding to ensure consistent wire format.
acceptance_criteria: HELLO message serializes to valid CBOR

tasks.title: Implement CBOR message serializer for CHALLENGE
tasks.description: Implement CBOR encoding/decoding for CHALLENGE messages. Support fields: nonce (32-byte byte string), timestamp (int64 Unix timestamp), verifier_domain (string), service_actions (array of strings), min_delegation_ttl (uint32), protocol_version (string). Ensure nonce is exactly 32 bytes.
acceptance_criteria: CHALLENGE message round-trips without data loss

tasks.title: Implement CBOR message serializer for RESPONSE
tasks.description: Implement CBOR encoding/decoding for RESPONSE messages. Support fields: nonce (byte string), timestamp (int64), delegation_token (byte string - raw COSE Sign1), device_key_signature (byte string - Ed25519 signature of nonce || timestamp || verifier_domain), wireguard_key (byte string). Handle nested CBOR structures correctly.
acceptance_criteria: RESPONSE message round-trips without data loss
Delegation token is passed as raw bytes

tasks.title: Implement CBOR message serializer for RESULT
tasks.description: Implement CBOR encoding/decoding for RESULT messages. Support fields: verified (boolean), reason_code (string or null), identity_domain (string or null), device_key (byte string or null), delegation_scope (array of strings or null), delegation_expiry (int64 or null), wireguard_key (byte string or null), supported_versions (array of strings - for version_unsupported case).
acceptance_criteria: RESULT message round-trips without data loss
Null fields handled correctly for failure cases

tasks.title: Implement length-prefixed TCP framing
tasks.description: Implement 4-byte big-endian uint32 length prefix framing per Section 13 for raw TCP transport. Create encode_frame(cbor_bytes) -> length_prefixed_bytes and decode_frame(stream) -> cbor_bytes functions. Handle partial reads, buffer management, and maximum message size limits (e.g., 64KB).

tasks.title: Implement Ed25519 signature verification core
tasks.description: Implement Ed25519 signature verification per RFC 8032 using established libraries: PyNaCl (Python), tweetnacl-js (Node.js), crypto/ed25519 (Go). Create verify_signature(message_bytes, signature, public_key) -> bool function. Validate public key format (32 bytes), signature format (64 bytes).

tasks.title: Implement COSE Sign1 structure parser
tasks.description: Implement COSE Sign1 (RFC 9052) parsing for delegation tokens. Parse protected header (algorithm -8 EdDSA), unprotected header, payload (delegation token CBOR), and signature. Extract the Ed25519 signature for verification. Handle CBOR tag 18 (COSE_Sign1).

tasks.title: Implement delegation token deserializer
tasks.description: Implement CBOR deserialization for delegation token payload extracted from COSE Sign1. Parse fields: delegation_id (string), identity_domain (string), device_key (byte string), services (array of strings), actions (array of strings), expires_at (int64), issued_at (int64), parent_delegation (optional byte string or null), sub_delegations (optional array).
acceptance_criteria: All delegation token fields parsed correctly

tasks.title: Implement delegation token signature verification
tasks.description: Verify COSE Sign1 Ed25519 signature against the identity's Master Key. Extract ToBeSigned (Sig_structure) per RFC 8152 section 4.4: ['Signature1', protected_header_bytes, external_aad (empty), payload_bytes]. Verify signature using Master Key public key.
acceptance_criteria: Valid COSE Sign1 signatures verify correctly

tasks.title: Implement DNS TXT record parser for _locd-svc
tasks.description: Implement semicolon-delimited key-value format parser for _locd-svc TXT records: v=locd-svc1; port=<uint16>; actions=<comma-separated-strings>; min-delegation-ttl=<uint32>. Parse into ServiceRecord structure. Validate required fields, type coercion (port to uint16, min-delegation-ttl to uint32). Handle escaped semicolons and quoted strings per DNS TXT record standards.

tasks.title: Implement DNSSEC-validating resolver
tasks.description: Implement DNS resolver with DNSSEC validation. Check AD (Authentic Data) bit in DNS response. Use system resolver with DNSSEC-aware flags or dedicated libraries (unbound, getdns, trust-dns). Implement fallback to DNS-over-HTTPS (RFC 8484) for privacy. Cache DNSSEC validation results.
acceptance_criteria: Proper error handling for DNS failures

tasks.title: Implement identity DNS lookup for _locd.<domain>
tasks.description: Implement DNS TXT lookup for _locd.<domain> to retrieve identity Master Key. Parse the record per Identity Layer spec: v=locd1; mk=<base64-encoded-Ed25519-public-key>; rev=<optional-https-url>. Decode base64 to get 32-byte Ed25519 public key. Validate record format and version.

tasks.title: Implement identity public key cache
tasks.description: Implement thread-safe/async-safe cache for resolved identity Master Keys. Key by domain name. Store: public_key (bytes), dns_ttl (seconds), expires_at (timestamp), dnssec_validated (bool). Implement atomic read/write. TTL expiry triggers re-query. Cache respects delegation token expiry.
acceptance_criteria: Cache stores entries keyed by domain
Does not serve cached keys past token expiry

tasks.title: Implement cryptographic nonce generator
tasks.description: Implement cryptographically secure 32-byte random nonce generation using os.urandom (Python), crypto.randomBytes (Node.js), crypto/rand (Go). Ensure CSPRNG quality. Generate unique nonce for each CHALLENGE message.

tasks.title: Implement CHALLENGE generation
tasks.description: Implement CHALLENGE message generation. Generate nonce, current timestamp, include verifier_domain, service_actions, min_delegation_ttl. Create CHALLENGE structure and serialize to CBOR. Store challenge state (nonce, timestamp, expected_identity_domain) for RESPONSE validation.

tasks.title: Implement timestamp skew validation
tasks.description: Implement timestamp tolerance check: verify RESPONSE timestamp is within 60 seconds of current time in either direction. Calculate absolute skew. Return timestamp_skew reason code if outside tolerance window.
acceptance_criteria: Timestamps outside window rejected with timestamp_skew

tasks.title: Implement nonce matching validation
tasks.description: Verify RESPONSE nonce matches the CHALLENGE nonce exactly. Compare 32-byte values using constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks. Return nonce_mismatch reason code if nonces don't match.

tasks.title: Implement device key signature verification
tasks.description: Verify the device_key_signature in RESPONSE message. Reconstruct signed message: nonce || timestamp || verifier_domain as bytes (nonce: 32 bytes, timestamp: 8 bytes big-endian int64, verifier_domain: UTF-8 bytes). Verify Ed25519 signature against device_key from delegation token.

tasks.title: Implement delegation expiry validation
tasks.description: Check delegation token expires_at field against current time. Return delegation_expired reason code if expires_at is in the past. Also check against cache expiry - don't use cached keys past token expiry.

tasks.title: Implement min-delegation-ttl enforcement
tasks.description: Calculate remaining TTL: delegation.expires_at - current_time. Compare against service's declared min-delegation-ttl. Reject with delegation_expired if remaining TTL is less than minimum. This prevents accepting tokens that expire too soon.

tasks.title: Implement service scope validation
tasks.description: Verify the service's domain is in the delegation token's services array. Return scope_violation if the current service domain is not listed. This ensures tokens are only valid for their intended services.
acceptance_criteria: Missing service domain rejected with scope_violation

tasks.title: Implement action scope validation
tasks.description: Verify the requested action is in the delegation token's actions array. Compare against service's declared required actions. Return scope_violation if the action is not permitted. Support wildcard or prefix matching if specified.

tasks.title: Implement DNS revocation record lookup
tasks.description: Query _locd-revoke.<domain> DNS TXT records for revocation entries. Parse semicolon-delimited format. Check if delegation_id appears in revocation list. Cache revocation results respecting DNS TTL.

tasks.title: Implement HTTPS revocation endpoint client
tasks.description: Fetch HTTPS revocation list from rev URL in identity record. Parse JSON response: {revoked: [{delegation_id, revoked_at, reason}], signature, issued_at}. Validate Ed25519 signature against identity Master Key. Check if delegation_id is in revoked list.

tasks.title: Implement revocation checking aggregator
tasks.description: Combine DNS and HTTPS revocation checks. Query both sources. Match in either source constitutes revocation. Return delegation_revoked reason code if found. Implement caching with configurable TTL.

tasks.title: Implement sub-delegation chain validation
tasks.description: Validate sub-delegation chains (depth up to 3). Verify each link: root token first, then each sub-delegation. Check no scope expansion (actions subset of parent), no expiry extension (sub-delegation expires before parent), valid signatures at each level. Count chain depth.

tasks.title: Implement LocdVerifier core class - constructor
tasks.description: Implement LocdVerifier class constructor accepting config: serviceDomain, wireguardPublicKey, actions[], minDelegationTTL, dnssecResolver (optional), revocationCacheSeconds (optional). Initialize internal state: cache, revocation cache, challenge state store.

tasks.title: Implement LocdVerifier.verify() - HELLO handling
tasks.description: Implement verify(hello_message) method entry point. Parse HELLO CBOR. Extract identity_domain, device_key. Trigger identity lookup. Generate and return CHALLENGE message. Store challenge state for RESPONSE validation.

tasks.title: Implement LocdVerifier.verify() - RESPONSE handling
tasks.description: Complete the verify flow: accept RESPONSE message. Validate nonce match, timestamp skew. Parse delegation token. Verify COSE Sign1 signature. Check expiry, min-ttl, service scope, action scope. Check revocation. Validate device signature. Return RESULT message.

tasks.title: Implement graceful DNS failure handling
tasks.description: Handle DNS lookup failures gracefully. If cached identity exists and not expired, serve from cache with degraded trust indicator. Log degradation event. If no cache, return dns_lookup_failed reason code. Implement circuit breaker for repeated DNS failures.

tasks.title: Implement protocol version negotiation
tasks.description: Handle version negotiation in HELLO. Check if received version is supported. If not, return RESULT with verified=false, reason_code=version_unsupported, supported_versions=[supported list]. Supported versions configured in verifier.

tasks.title: Implement WireGuard key exchange in RESULT
tasks.description: Include service's WireGuard public key in successful RESULT message. Accept claimant's WireGuard key from subsequent message. Configure WireGuard peer entry. Integrate with Mesh Connectivity Layer.

tasks.title: Implement LocdVerifier.publishServiceRecord()
tasks.description: Implement publishServiceRecord(dnsProvider, record) method. Support multiple providers: manual zone file generation, Route53 API, Cloudflare API. Construct _locd-svc TXT record value. Validate record format before publish. Return success status and record value.

tasks.title: Implement LocdVerifier.revokeCheck()
tasks.description: Implement revokeCheck(identityDomain, delegationId) public method. Query both DNS and HTTPS revocation sources. Return {revoked: bool, reason?: string, source?: 'dns'|'https'}. Useful for explicit revocation checks outside normal verification flow.

tasks.title: Implement challenge state storage and cleanup
tasks.description: Implement in-memory challenge state store with automatic cleanup. Store: nonce, timestamp, expected_identity_domain, created_at. TTL of 120 seconds (2x the 60s timestamp skew tolerance). Periodic cleanup of expired entries to prevent memory leaks.

tasks.title: Implement Express.js middleware - initialization
tasks.description: Create Express.js middleware factory: locdAuth(options). Options: serviceDomain, actions, fallbackAuth (optional function), minDelegationTTL, wireguardPublicKey. Initialize LocdVerifier instance. Return Express middleware function.

tasks.title: Implement Express.js middleware - request interception
tasks.description: Implement request interception logic. Check for Loc'd authentication headers or body. Parse CBOR message from request. Call verifier.verify(). On success, populate req.locd with identity info. On failure, return HTTP 401 with JSON body containing reason code.

tasks.title: Implement Express.js middleware - req.locd population
tasks.description: On successful verification, populate req.locd object with: identity_domain, device_key (bytes), delegation_scope (actions array), delegation_expiry (timestamp), wireguard_key (if exchanged). Ensure middleware is non-blocking (async).

tasks.title: Implement Express.js middleware - error responses
tasks.description: Return proper HTTP 401 responses on verification failure. Response body: {error: 'Authentication failed', locd_reason: '<reason_code>', message: '<human readable>'}. Include appropriate HTTP headers (WWW-Authenticate: Locd).

tasks.title: Implement FastAPI middleware - initialization
tasks.description: Create FastAPI middleware class LocdAuthMiddleware. Accept config: service_domain, actions, min_delegation_ttl, wireguard_public_key, fallback_auth (optional). Initialize LocdVerifier. Implement ASGI middleware interface.

tasks.title: Implement FastAPI middleware - request processing
tasks.description: Process incoming requests. Extract CBOR message. Call verifier.verify(). Handle async properly. On success, store identity in request state. On failure, raise HTTPException(401) with detail containing Loc'd reason code.

tasks.title: Implement FastAPI get_locd_identity dependency
tasks.description: Create FastAPI dependency function get_locd_identity(request) -> LocdIdentity. Extract identity from request state. Return LocdIdentity object with domain, device_key, scoped_actions, delegation_expiry. Raise HTTPException(401) if not authenticated.

tasks.title: Implement Go middleware - initialization
tasks.description: Create Go middleware package. Define Config struct: ServiceDomain, Actions ([]string), MinDelegationTTL, WireguardPublicKey, FallbackAuth (http.Handler). Create Middleware(config) function returning http.Handler wrapper.

tasks.title: Implement Go middleware - request handling
tasks.description: Implement ServeHTTP method. Read request body. Parse CBOR. Call verifier.Verify(). On success, set locd.Identity in request context using context.WithValue. Call next handler. On failure, return 401 with JSON reason code.

tasks.title: Implement Go middleware - context helper
tasks.description: Create helper function FromContext(ctx context.Context) (*Identity, bool) to extract Loc'd identity from request context. Define context key type to avoid collisions.

tasks.title: Implement hybrid authentication - Express.js
tasks.description: Support both Loc'd and legacy auth in Express middleware. fallbackAuth option: function(req) -> Promise<bool> or async. Try Loc'd first. If Loc'd fails and fallbackAuth provided, call fallbackAuth. If fallback succeeds, mark request as fallback-authenticated. Loc'd takes precedence if both present.

tasks.title: Implement hybrid authentication - FastAPI
tasks.description: Support hybrid auth in FastAPI. Config option fallback_auth: callable. Try Loc'd verification. On failure, try fallback. Return identity with auth_type field indicating 'locd' or 'fallback'.

tasks.title: Implement hybrid authentication - Go
tasks.description: Support hybrid auth in Go middleware. Config.FallbackAuth http.Handler. Try Loc'd first. If fails and FallbackAuth set, delegate to fallback handler. Set auth type in context.

tasks.title: Implement hybrid auth dashboard indicator metadata
tasks.description: Per Section 10.5, add dashboard indicator metadata to hybrid auth: green (Loc'd verified), yellow (fallback auth during migration), red (no auth). Add indicator to req.locd / request state.

tasks.title: Implement action-based authorization decorator - Express.js
tasks.description: Create requireLocdAction(action) decorator/middleware for Express. Check if req.locd exists and has required action in delegation_scope. If not, return 403 Forbidden. Chain after locdAuth middleware.

tasks.title: Implement action-based authorization decorator - FastAPI
tasks.description: Create require_locd_action(action) decorator/dependency for FastAPI. Use with Depends(get_locd_identity). Check if action in identity.scoped_actions. Raise HTTPException(403) if not authorized.

tasks.title: Implement action-based authorization decorator - Go
tasks.description: Create RequireAction(action string) middleware for Go. Extract identity from context. Check if action in identity.DelegationScope. If not, return 403 with error.

tasks.title: Implement service capability advertisement API
tasks.description: Create programmatic interface for services to declare capabilities: supported actions, required delegation scopes, minimum TTL constraints. ServiceCapability class with methods: addAction(action, description), setMinDelegationTTL(seconds), buildRecord() -> ServiceRecord.

tasks.title: Implement CLI tool structure
tasks.description: Create CLI entry point: locd-svc. Implement subcommands: publish, validate, dry-run. Use argparse (Python), commander (Node.js), cobra (Go). Implement global flags: --verbose, --config.

tasks.title: Implement CLI publish command
tasks.description: Implement locd-svc publish --domain <domain> --port <port> --actions <csv> --min-ttl <seconds> [--provider route53|cloudflare|zonefile] [--dry-run]. Validate inputs. Construct record. Call provider-specific publish logic.

tasks.title: Implement CLI validate command
tasks.description: Implement locd-svc validate --record <record-value>. Parse and validate _locd-svc TXT record format. Check all required fields present and valid. Exit code 1 on validation failure with descriptive message. Exit code 0 on success.

tasks.title: Implement CLI dry-run command
tasks.description: Implement locd-svc dry-run --domain <domain> --port <port> ... Constructs record, validates locally, simulates DNS resolution (verifies record format), reports what would be published without modifying DNS.

tasks.title: Implement Route53 DNS provider
tasks.description: Implement Route53 API integration for publishing _locd-svc records. Use boto3 (Python), AWS SDK (Node.js/Go). Support credentials from environment, IAM role, or config file. Implement UPSERT operation. Handle errors.

tasks.title: Implement Cloudflare DNS provider
tasks.description: Implement Cloudflare API integration. Use Cloudflare API client. Support API token authentication. Implement record creation/update. Handle errors and rate limiting.

tasks.title: Implement zone file DNS provider
tasks.description: Implement zone file generation provider. Generate BIND-format zone file entries. Output to stdout or file. Format: _locd-svc.<domain> IN TXT "v=locd-svc1; port=...; actions=...; min-delegation-ttl=...". Escape quotes properly.

tasks.title: Implement WireGuard peer configuration
tasks.description: Integrate with WireGuard for tunnel establishment. After successful verification, configure WireGuard peer with claimant's public key. Generate or retrieve service's WireGuard key pair. Handle platform differences (Linux, macOS, Windows).

tasks.title: Implement logging subsystem
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive logging for verification events. Log: success/failure, reason code, identity domain, delegation ID, timestamp. Never log private keys or full delegation tokens. Support multiple log levels. Structured logging (JSON).

tasks.title: Implement audit trail logging
tasks.description: Implement detailed audit trail for security events. Log: verification attempts, identity lookups, revocation checks, DNS failures. Include request metadata (IP, user agent if available). Separate audit log from operational logs.

tasks.title: Implement monitoring metrics
tasks.description: Implement metrics collection: verification count by result, latency histograms, cache hit/miss rates, DNS lookup times, revocation check times. Support Prometheus format. Export metrics endpoint.

tasks.title: Implement health check endpoint
tasks.description: Implement health check for the verifier service. Check: DNS resolver connectivity, cache status, WireGuard availability. Return 200 OK if healthy, 503 if degraded. Include health details in response.

tasks.title: Implement concurrent verification support
tasks.description: Ensure verification engine supports concurrent verifications without shared mutable state. Use thread-safe data structures. Implement connection pooling for DNS. Test with 100+ concurrent verifications.

tasks.title: Implement async I/O for non-blocking operation
tasks.description: Ensure middleware doesn't block event loop (Node.js) or request thread (Python). Use async/await for all I/O: DNS lookups, revocation checks, HTTP requests. Python: use asyncio. Node.js: use async. Go: naturally async.

tasks.title: Implement circuit breaker for DNS failures
tasks.description: Implement circuit breaker pattern for DNS lookups. Track failure count. Open circuit after threshold (e.g., 5 failures in 60s). Return degraded mode or error quickly when circuit open. Half-open after timeout.

tasks.title: Implement rate limiting for verification
tasks.description: Implement rate limiting to prevent abuse. Per-IP and global rate limits. Configurable limits. Use token bucket or sliding window algorithm. Return 429 Too Many Requests when limited.

tasks.title: Implement input validation and sanitization
tasks.description: Validate all inputs: domain names (length, characters), port numbers (1-65535), actions (string format), TTL values (positive integers). Sanitize strings to prevent injection. Reject malformed inputs early.

tasks.title: Implement secure memory handling
tasks.description: Implement secure handling of sensitive data. Clear memory containing keys after use (where possible). Use secure comparison for secrets. Mark sensitive data in logs.

tasks.title: Implement WebSocket transport support
tasks.description: Extend verification to work over WebSocket transport. Handle CBOR messages over WebSocket frames. Implement message framing. Support bidirectional communication.

tasks.title: Implement HTTP transport support
tasks.description: Support CBOR messages over HTTP POST. Content-Type: application/cbor. Response with CBOR body. Standard HTTP status codes. Work with existing middleware.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for CBOR serialization
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for CBOR message serializers. Test all message types. Test edge cases: empty fields, null values, maximum sizes. Verify round-trip integrity. Test malformed CBOR handling.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for cryptographic operations
tasks.description: Write unit tests for Ed25519 signature verification, COSE Sign1 parsing, nonce generation. Test with known-good and known-bad signatures. Test with test vectors from RFCs.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for delegation token validation
tasks.description: Write unit tests for all validation rules: expiry, min-ttl, service scope, action scope. Test each failure reason code. Test valid tokens pass. Test edge cases: boundary values, empty arrays.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for revocation checking
tasks.description: Write unit tests for DNS and HTTPS revocation checking. Test revoked and not-revoked cases. Test signature validation for HTTPS lists. Test caching behavior.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for sub-delegation validation
tasks.description: Write unit tests for sub-delegation chain validation. Test valid chains depth 1-3. Test scope expansion detection. Test expiry extension detection. Test depth > 3 rejection.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for caching layer
tasks.description: Write unit tests for identity cache. Test TTL expiry, token expiry boundary, concurrent access. Test cache hit and miss scenarios. Test memory limits.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for full verification flow
tasks.description: Write end-to-end integration tests for complete HELLO->CHALLENGE->RESPONSE->RESULT flow. Mock DNS responses. Use test keys and tokens. Verify all success and failure paths.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for middleware
tasks.description: Write integration tests for Express, FastAPI, and Go middleware. Test request interception, context population, error responses. Test hybrid auth mode. Use test HTTP servers.

tasks.title: Write concurrency and load tests
tasks.description: Write tests for concurrent verification: 100 simultaneous verifications. Test for race conditions, deadlocks. Measure latency under load. Test cache behavior under concurrency.

tasks.title: Write tests for CLI tool
tasks.description: Write tests for CLI commands: publish, validate, dry-run. Test argument parsing. Test validation logic. Test exit codes. Mock DNS provider APIs.

tasks.title: Write security tests
tasks.description: Write security-focused tests: replay attacks (reuse nonce), timestamp manipulation, signature forgery attempts, invalid delegation chains, scope escalation attempts. Verify all are rejected.

tasks.title: Create API documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive API documentation for LocdVerifier class and all public methods. Document parameters, return values, exceptions. Include code examples for each language.

tasks.title: Create middleware usage guides
tasks.description: Create usage guides for Express, FastAPI, and Go middleware. Include setup instructions, configuration examples, route protection examples, hybrid auth setup.

tasks.title: Create CLI documentation
tasks.description: Document the CLI tool: installation, configuration, publish command, validate command, dry-run command. Include examples for each DNS provider.

tasks.title: Create protocol implementation guide
tasks.description: Document the protocol implementation details: message formats, verification flow, reason codes, security considerations. Reference relevant sections of the Loc'd spec.

tasks.title: Create troubleshooting guide
tasks.description: Create troubleshooting guide for common issues: DNS lookup failures, DNSSEC validation errors, delegation token validation failures, revocation check issues. Include debugging steps and log interpretation.

tasks.title: Create deployment guide
tasks.description: Create deployment guide covering: environment setup, configuration management, monitoring setup, health checks, scaling considerations, disaster recovery.

tasks.title: Create security hardening guide
tasks.description: Create security hardening guide: key management, secure memory, audit logging, rate limiting, input validation, DNSSEC enforcement. Include security checklist.

tasks.title: Create migration guide from legacy auth
tasks.description: Create guide for migrating from legacy authentication to Loc'd. Cover hybrid auth setup, gradual rollout, monitoring during migration, rollback procedures.

tasks.title: Implement performance benchmarks
tasks.description: Implement performance benchmarks: verification latency, throughput, memory usage. Benchmark under various loads. Compare cached vs non-cached lookups.

tasks.title: Optimize hot paths
tasks.description: Profile and optimize performance hot paths: signature verification, CBOR parsing, cache lookups. Consider batching, caching strategies, algorithmic improvements.

tasks.title: Implement memory optimization
tasks.description: Optimize memory usage: cache size limits, object pooling, garbage collection tuning. Set maximum cache sizes. Implement LRU eviction.

tasks.title: Create example applications
tasks.description: Create example applications demonstrating SDK usage: Express.js API server, FastAPI server, Go HTTP server. Include docker-compose setup for testing.

tasks.title: Implement error handling improvements
tasks.description: Review and improve error handling throughout. Ensure all errors have context. Implement error wrapping. Create custom error types for different failure modes.

tasks.title: Implement configuration validation
tasks.description: Implement strict configuration validation. Validate all config values on startup. Fail fast with descriptive errors for invalid configuration. Provide config examples and schema.

tasks.title: Implement graceful shutdown
tasks.description: Implement graceful shutdown handling. Close connections, flush logs, clear caches on shutdown. Handle SIGTERM, SIGINT signals.

tasks.title: Implement telemetry and tracing
tasks.description: Implement distributed tracing support: OpenTelemetry integration. Trace verification flows across components. Add spans for DNS lookups, signature verification, revocation checks.

tasks.title: Create test vectors for interoperability
tasks.description: Create test vectors for interoperability testing: sample keys, sample delegation tokens (valid and invalid), sample messages, expected verification results. Publish in standard format.

tasks.title: Implement fuzz testing
tasks.description: Implement fuzz testing for message parsers. Fuzz CBOR parsers, DNS record parsers. Test for crashes, panics, unexpected behavior on malformed input.

tasks.title: Implement disaster recovery procedures
tasks.description: Document and implement disaster recovery: cache backup/restore, DNS failure handling, WireGuard key backup, configuration backup. Test recovery procedures.

tasks.title: Define core audit event schemas and enums
tasks.description: Create the foundational type definitions for audit events including event_type enum (key_generation, delegation_created, delegation_validated, delegation_revoked, verification_attempt, verification_success, verification_failure, mesh_established, mesh_teardown, credential_access, recovery_initiated, recovery_completed), event_id (UUID v4), timestamp format (Unix microseconds), and common fields. Define TypeScript interfaces or Rust structs for all audit event variants with discriminated union patterns.
acceptance_criteria: All event types defined per technical spec
Schema supports cryptographic chaining with prev_hash field
Type definitions enforce required fields at compile time

tasks.title: Design key generation audit event schema
tasks.description: Implement detailed schema for key generation events including event type, timestamp, identity domain, key fingerprint (public key hash), hardware attestation status, key type (master/device/session), and result (success/failure with error code). Include CBOR serialization support.
acceptance_criteria: Schema captures all fields from acceptance criterion 1
Supports all key types (master, device, session)

tasks.title: Design delegation creation audit event schema
tasks.description: Implement schema for delegation creation events including delegator identity, delegate key fingerprint, delegation ID, scope (services and actions arrays), expiry timestamp, sub-delegation flag, signing master key fingerprint, and creation result.

tasks.title: Design verification attempt audit event schema
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive schema for verification attempt events including claimant identity, verifier identity, device key fingerprint, delegation ID, verification step results (DNS lookup, DNSSEC validation, delegation signature, expiry check, revocation check, scope check, nonce verification, timestamp check), final outcome, and reason code.
acceptance_criteria: Schema captures all 9 verification steps per criterion 3
Reason codes from protocol table supported
Step-by-step results stored as structured array

tasks.title: Design revocation audit event schema
tasks.description: Implement schema for revocation events including revoking identity, delegation ID revoked, revocation reason enum (device_lost, device_compromised, key_rotation, scope_change, user_initiated), publication targets (DNS/HTTPS), and timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: All revocation reasons defined as enum
Publication targets as array of enums

tasks.title: Define EventBus interface and async broadcast contract
tasks.description: Create the EventBus interface with emit(AuditEvent) method for protocol components and subscribe(filter) method for monitoring consumers. Implement async broadcast channel pattern with fire-and-forget semantics. Define event filtering capabilities by event type, identity, and outcome.
acceptance_criteria: EventBus interface supports emit and subscribe operations
Broadcast channel is non-blocking for emitters

tasks.title: Implement in-memory EventBus with async channels
tasks.description: Build the concrete EventBus implementation using async broadcast channels. Support multiple subscribers, filtered subscriptions, and backpressure handling. Implement graceful degradation when subscribers are slow.
acceptance_criteria: Backpressure does not block protocol operations
Events delivered to all matching subscribers

tasks.title: Design LogStore interface for abstracted storage
tasks.description: Create the LogStore interface with operations: append(event) -> event_id, query-by-time-range(start, end, filters, cursor, limit) -> Page<AuditEvent>, query-by-filter(filters, cursor, limit), and verify-chain(start, end) -> ChainVerification. Support pluggable storage backends.
acceptance_criteria: Chain verification returns tamper detection result

tasks.title: Implement cryptographic chaining for tamper detection
tasks.description: Build SHA-256 based cryptographic chaining where each entry references hash of previous entry bytes. Implement chain verification algorithm that detects insertions, deletions, or modifications. Target verification scan under 10 seconds for 1 million entries.
acceptance_criteria: Each entry includes prev_hash (SHA-256 of previous entry)
Chain breaks detectable by verification scan
Verification completes in <10 seconds for 1M entries

tasks.title: Implement append-only file storage backend
tasks.description: Build LogStore implementation using append-only file storage with hourly rotation (one file per hour). Implement file naming convention with timestamps. Handle file creation, appending with atomic writes, and file rotation logic.
acceptance_criteria: Files rotate hourly with timestamp in filename
Atomic append operations prevent data corruption

tasks.title: Implement SQLite indexing for query acceleration
tasks.description: Build optional SQLite index layer for LogStore supporting fast queries by time range, event type, identity, and outcome. Implement index synchronization with file storage. Create indexes for common query patterns.
acceptance_criteria: SQLite schema optimized for audit queries
Indexes on timestamp, event_type, identity_domain, outcome
Query latency under 2 seconds for 30-day ranges
Index stays synchronized with file storage

tasks.title: Implement AuditLogger.append with cryptographic chaining
tasks.description: Build the AuditLogger component with append(event) method that computes SHA-256 hash of previous entry, adds to new entry, and persists to LogStore. Handle edge cases including first entry (no prev_hash) and chain recovery.
acceptance_criteria: Cryptographic chain maintained on each append
First entry uses special genesis handling

tasks.title: Implement AuditLogger.query with cursor pagination
tasks.description: Build query method supporting time-range queries, filtering by event type/identity/device/outcome, and cursor-based pagination. Return Page<AuditEvent> with entries and opaque continuation token. Max page size 1000 entries.

tasks.title: Implement AuditLogger.verify-chain integrity check
tasks.description: Build chain verification method that validates cryptographic links from start to end entry. Detect tampering by hash mismatch detection. Support incremental verification using verified_up_to cursor for efficiency.

tasks.title: Implement AuditLogger.export for SIEM integration
tasks.description: Build export method supporting JSON Lines and CSV formats. Implement streaming output for large exports. Map fields to standardized SIEM schema with timestamp in ISO 8601 and protocol fields nested under details object.
acceptance_criteria: JSON Lines format with one JSON object per line

tasks.title: Build event buffer for graceful degradation
tasks.description: Implement in-memory event buffer with configurable max size (default 10,000 events) for when audit log storage is unavailable. Implement buffer flush when storage recovers. Emit warnings during buffer operation.
acceptance_criteria: Protocol operations continue during buffer mode

tasks.title: Define ThreatRule schema for configurable detection
tasks.description: Create schema for threat detection rules including event pattern (event type + conditions), time window, threshold count, severity level (info/warning/critical), and alert action. Support rule configuration via JSON/YAML.
acceptance_criteria: ThreatRule schema defined with all fields

tasks.title: Implement default threat detection rules
tasks.description: Build default rules: rapid delegation (>10 in 1 min from single master key), verification failure burst (>50 in 5 min from single identity), replay detection (duplicate nonce within tolerance), and scope escalation (sub-delegation exceeds parent scope).
acceptance_criteria: Rapid delegation rule: >10 delegations in 1 minute
Verification burst rule: >50 failures in 5 minutes
All rules generate alerts within 5 seconds

tasks.title: Implement sliding window counter with ring buffer
tasks.description: Build time-bucketed ring buffer (1-second granularity, configurable window) for efficient sliding window counting. Target 1KB memory per tracked identity/IP pair. Implement increment and query operations.

tasks.title: Build ThreatDetector engine core
tasks.description: Implement ThreatDetector with register_rule(ThreatRule), on_event(AuditEvent) internal consumption, and get_active_alerts(filters) methods. Connect to EventBus subscriber. Evaluate rules against incoming events in real-time.
acceptance_criteria: Events evaluated against all matching rules

tasks.title: Implement rapid delegation detection rule
tasks.description: Build specific rule for detecting when single master key creates >10 delegations within 1-minute window. Track by master key fingerprint. Generate alert with severity 'warning' including count and time window details.
acceptance_criteria: Tracks delegation_created events per master key
Alert within 5 seconds of threshold breach
Alert includes master key fingerprint and count

tasks.title: Implement verification failure burst detection
tasks.description: Build rule for detecting when single identity receives >50 verification failures within 5-minute window. Track by claimant identity domain. Generate 'critical' severity alert with failure patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Includes failure count and source IPs

tasks.title: Implement timestamp skew anomaly detection
tasks.description: Build rule for detecting anomalous timestamp patterns including events from the future, events with suspicious backdating, and clock drift patterns across verification attempts.

tasks.title: Implement replay attempt detection integration
tasks.description: Build integration with NonceTracker to detect replay attempts. When duplicate nonce detected, emit replay_detected threat event. Record source IP and identity. Generate alert within the 60-second tolerance window.

tasks.title: Implement delegation scope escalation detection
tasks.description: Build rule for detecting when sub-delegation contains services or actions not present in parent delegation. Compare child scope arrays against parent scope. Generate alert with both delegation IDs.
acceptance_criteria: Compares service arrays for superset violations
Compares action arrays for superset violations
Alert includes parent and child delegation IDs

tasks.title: Implement event correlation engine
tasks.description: Build correlation engine that links related events across protocol layers. Detect patterns like delegation creation followed by immediate verification attempts across many services (credential stuffing indicator). Support configurable correlation windows.

tasks.title: Define Alert schema and severity levels
tasks.description: Create Alert schema with fields: alert_id (UUID), severity (info/warning/critical), threat_type, affected_identities, evidence_summary, recommended_action, timestamp, source_events. Support JSON serialization.
acceptance_criteria: Alert schema with all required fields
Source events as array of event IDs

tasks.title: Implement alert deduplication with composite key
tasks.description: Build deduplication using (threat_type, identity_domain, source_ip) composite key with configurable suppression window (default 5 minutes). Increment counter on duplicate rather than generating new notification.

tasks.title: Build alerting notification system
tasks.description: Implement configurable alerting supporting webhook, email, and in-protocol push channels. Deliver JSON payloads with alert ID, severity, threat type, affected identities, evidence summary, and recommended action within 10 seconds.

tasks.title: Implement webhook alert channel
tasks.description: Build webhook alert delivery with HTTP POST to configured endpoints. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff, timeout handling, and endpoint health checking. Support webhook signature verification for security.

tasks.title: Implement rate limiting with token bucket algorithm
tasks.description: Build RateLimiter with check(identity, source_ip) method using token bucket algorithm. Support configurable bucket capacity, refill rate, and refill interval. Return RateLimitResult with allowed boolean and retry_after seconds.

tasks.title: Implement per-IP rate limiting with default thresholds
tasks.description: Build per-IP rate limiting with default threshold of 100 requests per minute. Block source IP when exceeded and return rate_limited reason code. Resume service after sliding window expires.
acceptance_criteria: Default: 100 requests per minute per IP

tasks.title: Implement per-identity rate limiting with independent thresholds
tasks.description: Build per-identity rate limiting with default threshold of 20 verification requests per minute. Operate independently from per-IP limits. Apply more restrictive limit when both would apply.
acceptance_criteria: Default: 20 requests per minute per identity

tasks.title: Implement rate limit state storage with LRU eviction
tasks.description: Build shared-nothing per-worker hash map for rate limit state with LRU eviction when memory threshold reached (default 100MB). Implement memory tracking and eviction policies.

tasks.title: Build NonceTracker with time-partitioned hash set
tasks.description: Implement NonceTracker with record(nonce, timestamp) method returning boolean indicating if nonce was already seen. Use time-partitioned hash set with 10-second buckets. Target lookup latency under 1ms at 10k concurrent verifications/second.
acceptance_criteria: record returns true if nonce seen before

tasks.title: Implement automatic nonce expiry cleanup
tasks.description: Build automatic cleanup for nonce entries with 120-second retention (2x the 60-second timestamp tolerance). Drop entire buckets after expiry. Avoid per-entry expiry timers for efficiency.

tasks.title: Integrate NonceTracker with verification layer
tasks.description: Build integration that intercepts RESPONSE message before final verification. Check nonce from CHALLENGE against NonceTracker. If found, reject verification with nonce_mismatch reason code and emit replay_detected event.

tasks.title: Implement MetricsCollector with lockless histograms
tasks.description: Build MetricsCollector with record_timing(operation, duration_us) method using lockless HDR Histogram implementation with microsecond precision. Support p50/p95/p99/max queries without blocking hot path.

tasks.title: Implement Ed25519 signing performance metrics
tasks.description: Build instrumentation for Ed25519 signature generation and verification latencies. Record to MetricsCollector with operation names 'ed25519_sign' and 'ed25519_verify'. Track p50/p95/p99 percentiles.

tasks.title: Implement X25519 key agreement performance metrics
tasks.description: Build instrumentation for X25519 key agreement operation latencies. Record to MetricsCollector with operation name 'x25519_key_agree'. Support percentile queries.

tasks.title: Implement CBOR encode/decode performance metrics
tasks.description: Build instrumentation for CBOR encoding and decoding operation latencies. Record separate metrics for 'cbor_encode' and 'cbor_decode'. Track message sizes alongside latencies.

tasks.title: Implement COSE Sign1 performance metrics
tasks.description: Build instrumentation for COSE Sign1 creation and verification operation latencies. Record 'cose_sign1_create' and 'cose_sign1_verify' metrics with microsecond precision.

tasks.title: Implement DNS lookup performance metrics
tasks.description: Build instrumentation tracking three DNS phases separately: DoH TCP connection time, DNS query round-trip time, DNSSEC validation computation time. Record distinct metrics for each phase.

tasks.title: Implement DNS cache hit/miss ratio tracking
tasks.description: Build cache performance metrics tracking hit/miss ratio per identity domain with 5-minute reporting intervals. Record 'dns_cache_hit' and 'dns_cache_miss' counters.

tasks.title: Implement Prometheus /metrics endpoint
tasks.description: Build HTTP endpoint at /api/monitoring/metrics exposing metrics in Prometheus exposition format. Implement get_metrics() -> MetricsSnapshot conversion to Prometheus text format.

tasks.title: Build compliance reporting aggregation engine
tasks.description: Implement aggregation pipelines for compliance reports: delegation lifecycle analysis joining delegation_created with delegation_revoked events, key rotation analysis grouping key_generation events by identity with time-gap detection.

tasks.title: Implement delegation usage statistics report
tasks.description: Build report calculating: number of active vs expired vs revoked delegations per identity, percentage using default 24-hour expiry vs custom expiry, and delegation creation rate trends.

tasks.title: Implement revocation response time tracking
tasks.description: Build report calculating average revocation response time: time between revocation request and confirmation of DNS record update. Track DNS propagation and HTTPS list update times separately.
acceptance_criteria: Measures revocation request to DNS propagation
Measures revocation request to HTTPS update

tasks.title: Implement key rotation schedule adherence report
tasks.description: Build report analyzing key_rotation events to calculate rotation frequency per identity and adherence to rotation schedules. Identify identities with overdue rotations.

tasks.title: Implement delegation expiry distribution analysis
tasks.description: Build report analyzing delegation expiry distribution across the protocol. Calculate histogram of expiry durations, identify patterns, and detect anomalous short or long expiry configurations.

tasks.title: Build compliance report API endpoint
